The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | [](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmZg6I8IufUnbwLHo0iQGg8haMpxHsY-HVi8lmmo4jW6rWVSZEnF804jiN087CHF96BungMQ0vke1g1CpT9hZWmKH703JVsxzlR6HuCRo9AoLxTtNWxY95wxC_5qksf_1-R8vlYdODVfee-nODonazaN3NBC0MqJIk-UDhni-b5t_0AmGg-gJbVvVtA_3BeNo-IJjRtqWrFMIbVmttt3TQ5g%3D%3D)

Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmBr1YfEXigsSoWNo-0GUQaLC1hIYeaxbXkRCR6US0Cld7VYFpkxpiTwtzKSVy45qsBTxi_K2AT_3kWZ3xhzuLPREGcJWKwfC684ZE_16NrOgxiCiCAmtdJ8dwWz1vQgLqO6pHp1zrtmoc05FLom1hflTbZRmxe8hoz1eMPqrxAAyTj4qzhCusvWyFBKLjRnbF186MrzXA5l5jRJQKCnH7xg%3D%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6Rms_IM9YusUYRYFxYIM8gU9Ku13zW9A6OpYPelDjjxw4UMRqH3-6eZt8ZFwtI5puauSaNvlZr8MKINaE6zynvZCjVhnzbxcAu-6mCw336UW_FYLyM-j7uzHstIj0oCQ9WNgqjzM6mdP1qcWuehN72VaoeMUC_M0MKKrgRzYZwh1EhPN8W9Yht7xqsfMutdzWKnOZ9hBn8UOPYJLvF_RuYdng%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmtR-AQaohMCdtsJzRlgoZfHcB-Xfw07GdljEMJfDN0DQ0g5Hbxls_wz1fskn7eJj-Wt8mrICsksfTLxGKJumrpOR7pbrXcRPb1-9HViY7PxemnfPFabm11iSW7RsG1gXu-H0AWcgf-NKhABupTfGGrnAz7A1myCtAVJJtKO2X_Nd0KAKniEeBmDdrV14BnAvG6esJOdUjONYsoFtv7TNW0g%3D%3D)
---

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmF0HjVAy5_8WMFjw1qvC2WP_IA289VB9bbtH6FgEh1lEJNk56nMsTHwK3OriLWoDbafQWtqBIpWcyQsJ74_HfqP9AH01RxayEuu_kHgKRXDda8_V0H0TBt1nc1ly6VepgXHpCGHtmh5pSAgvgEQaOkvBFxz4z-fGlMqV65wCopCvX9eFdH4AYtsNFZOeFEcuRHnNgZh5VlZpSqCQ6Z7t1QA%3D%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmuuEE0KFgGlGsqNWn2eO71L1Yl0bidzIAUO5FLz8TZRDqYHnvwbEV1MbYJSw2agL0-XQd8MzNmlNy3Q7psN6hyytkBBqUxMfxo_YrJlD6c2xdvq-fbUgt9Wi36oI3lfb8TXRoHIKy-LVvrjIE4sf5pshZ8FlBpuWcoOevN45BaN4kCjRgGK8q-cKBEg5fixEoJJclQwZKtGChbTOfqvbGPQ%3D%3D)

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmRGKZwWAX-5vqzhAFw1AF-FoU4ivWgZCvHSjAEW90hRYggQRbhVIyu4OZ2A0wubKbEpGrP-UQHn-VY1_l-z2X1eXelYH3bBqWd9oTv0BbHNN3Ktv2ZnrWwb5rpgOsjOFovInAdYA4L7jU0Z1IB_DKii-tIIJkxaG_LxYPyeTYYScA9U44yQbg6ywjEAPpULlcxlQaUINhDxdI1oOKn4aPyA%3D%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.makingagreateramerica.com/u/click?_t=61da4500de824401a8b93478db1cc37b&_m=feed346baad944b8992a30f6fdac6504&_e=hiJiaxbi6NnisL_khnT-LVZmS0xoIXa7Q2gC9g7E2eTKeoPJzqQdiMYfnzO-eo7gwXMgK67rktWiAl5DPreyOe7UNAcw8sY94ufMGE_PYJea0uwwqlWLRaVeeKCqN1EN5CI1emBRdDnCRwVf4bG0TFJiSS4jQpACA3qQKnACIx4rYl96T_MtmF5O3bbLa6RmtaIjIYDYUEvgvAl2eHWRs74KVM_KombUUlOzd6hYYEqXyAy8GjtEjYdxlgpMpT2MNbw5XLDsQxkEVVJtYoL16aVTW4lQxwh-eux0cGwGe4hhvTx-VjjuS0QiFkiHP7y_N7nTuU5F4wWnGd-xP3PwPpzNUqaNzjLo2z0LAT1Z6u2p0TQS2hwnHc_ea76BxYwA9MO8vBhqvuZwXKBgPyclMA%3D%3D)

The Democrats and their allies in the Fake News media are coming after us with an intensity I've never seen before. They want to see my father fail and they've proven there is no line they won't cross. The President really needs your support right now, which is why, for a short time, he's offering YOU the chance to make 800% MORE of an impact. See below. We are only offering an 800%-MATCH on contributions for our BEST supporters, like YOU. This offer won't be on the table for very long. If you miss your chance now, you may never get another opportunity. Thank you, Eric Trump \--------- Forwarded Message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Subject: Can you match this? To: Friend, Our Nation needs you. I am facing unprecedented challenges from the Fake News media and their Democrat Partners. With less than two months until the Election, they are coming after me more viciously than EVER before. It's NEVER going to stop, which is why I'm counting on YOUR support during this critical time. For a short time, when you step up and contribute ANY AMOUNT, your gift will be 800%-MATCHED! See below. I can't offer this exclusive opportunity to everyone, so please, do not share this. That's right. Contribute ANY AMOUNT and it will be MATCHED by 800%. Thank you, Donald J. name: Steve Chabot
subject: The Green New Disaster
body:
It's not easy being green... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [The Green New Disaster](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-j/)
My opponent, Kate Schroder, and I met for two debates last week. I hate to use the word "lie" when talking about another person, but that's exactly what Ms. Schroder did a number of times during both debates. In this week's blog, I discuss these lies and one particular one that will get your blood boiling. She supports AOC's Green New Deal, which could cost our country $93 trillion, or your household approximately $600,000! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Debates and More Debates](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-d/)
Well, it's that time of the campaign cycle - time for debates. In this week's blog post I discuss my thoughts on last week's Trump-Biden debate and clue you into a series of local debates, with yours truly, that you will not want to miss! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [So What the Heck is a Discharge Petition (and Why Should I Care?)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-u/)
There's no question that American small businesses were drastically affected by the COVID crisis. One important lifeline for small businesses, the PPP (Paycheck Protection Program), expired in early August with $138 billion still available in its coffers. For the past few weeks, I've been trying to get a bill passed to reopen PPP to help ailing businesses. Unfortunately Nancy Pelosi won't allow the bill to come up for a vote. In this weeks blog, I discuss how a discharge petition might be our only hope. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Stark Choice: Support the Police, or Undermine Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-n/)
As you can imagine, there are a lot of differences between myself and my opponent on the issues. However, none are as stark as my record of supporting the police, and my opponent Kate Schroder's record of undermining them. That is why this past Monday, I received the endorsement of both Dan Hils, President of the Cincinnati FOP, and Hamilton County Sheriff Jim Neil, who was elected Sheriff twice as a Democrat. In this week's blog, I discuss why now, more than ever, we need to support our police and first responders. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-v/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-e/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-juyhjtul-l-s)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-juyhjtul-961825B2-kujkulhluu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-juyhjtul-kujkulhluu-w/)

Tap or click to read more >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/e7f9f5f2970619eec3d6b838967d376c/33153) Peter, Did you catch my first debate against DC Jeanne Shaheen last week? She spent the entire time deflecting questions about her socialist policies and twisting my words against me.

Now it's time for round 2 where I will get the opportunity to set the record straight.

In a couple hours, I'm going to be taking the stage once again debating her and, if you have the opportunity to watch, you can tune in LIVE from your computer! **The whole thing will be streamed in real-time on the NHPR Facebook page from 9 - 10 AM. [Just click or tap here to watch!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/b4b65a815c0115a3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)** [💻 Tune in from 9 - 10 AM!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/e9a9683ccadf938dc3d6b838967d376c/33153) It is absolutely critical that we keep the Senate RED in November — and Democrats know they have no chance of winning the majority if we FLIP this seat.

DC Jeanne Shaheen can't hide from the voters any longer, and I'm looking forward to another opportunity to expose her radical-left campaign.

I hope you're able to tune in today, you can watch from your phone or your computer! [_**Just click or tap here to go to the NHPR Facebook page where it will be live-streamed**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/adcbec4bee5fb741c3d6b838967d376c/33153).

\- Corky [💻 Tune in from 9 - 10 AM!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/a27830ebdf03f90fc3d6b838967d376c/33153) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/69936d85b9db3820c3d6b838967d376c/33153) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/b4d972dbdd969fd2/b4cb951c9f930875c3d6b838967d376c/33153)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: While I’m chairing these hearings
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
This isn’t about Obamacare; it’s about the rule of law! This isn't about Obamacare; it's about the rule of law! | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=31a3fdc172444ddb8a52f54b493bc03f&_e=oQcCeT2fE4T-oa_0ADYuFD8m_-IRg9RQlhj8fMkQioa-EdUeuOGkHRlRH0XAFzfIyxi9fisCQqR7AL2CTHjFoBTUQxhemw0X1DCWsC2k2CdZ5455SDhyM38spiPc2F7Y1Fg_1XNaK4MnFemWHXrd3eO3qPP-HEsm5HNzM2FqQWbA0sZ6Pf7tUsCTOWjDunebgaJGbZ1lXSVnjGMsQtnbvfhP6FsxT4RvBwXBMF660oH5w6heXQiHUYDhje4U9dp0vqza7Qa4BNsqoar81G4KdkgBE9vnZMByrLwHpzw1DGuNUlFTrRIVtO1YJXKwzV2cXcVyOT5xopCHcfJD9pua0Or17PhxfEnHOb-WMdhOBFgdpFCkwabnTfMwx9N46F3g)
---
Peter,

The radical Left is working with the Democrats in the U.S. Senate to hijack Judge Amy Coney Barrett's nomination hearing, and I won't stand for it.

This hearing isn't about Obamacare. It's not about President Trump. And it's not about the Democrats' grievances with our duly-elected Republican Senate majority.

Pure and simple, this hearing is about the rule of law - something the Democrats seem to attack whenever things don't go their way. Just look at the violent protests in the streets these last few months!

The same Radical Leftists who've hijacked these hearings are pouring $100 million into my opponent's campaign, **[so I'm in a bit of a bind.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=31a3fdc172444ddb8a52f54b493bc03f&_e=oQcCeT2fE4T-oa_0ADYuFD8m_-IRg9RQlhj8fMkQioa-EdUeuOGkHRlRH0XAFzfIyxi9fisCQqR7AL2CTHjFoBTUQxhemw0X1DCWsC2k2CdZ5455SDhyM38spiPc2F7Y1Fg_1XNaK4MnFemWHXrd3eO3qPP-HEsm5HNzM2FqQWbxzCmxdQYKw2vSMJoZfdr2QtBZ8-Pvea4KDXNrlrXr08V2lGCKlRVyiY3TluSOlvx6vraX-SLn4VTlkFuiiF4krKZvuo5gDnhqpTAtE-Y09QdKjIUTduF09fBQX9BciiA_tMyF3XAtzcoLUlNQ-Ik3xxRPaWtDYd2-LnyIwFeB2-H5j1NMyc6kaETPU-2cx0K0Qhbb1fXXVRxdWrG78vOQ)**

While I'm chairing these hearings and doing the job I was elected to do, my opponent is free to campaign and raise money in these final days of the campaign. It seems like every day a new liberal group I've never even heard of launches another million-dollar attack ad against me.

**[Peter, that's why I'm counting on friends and patriots like you right now to step in and fill the void.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=31a3fdc172444ddb8a52f54b493bc03f&_e=oQcCeT2fE4T-oa_0ADYuFD8m_-IRg9RQlhj8fMkQioa-EdUeuOGkHRlRH0XAFzfIyxi9fisCQqR7AL2CTHjFoBTUQxhemw0X1DCWsC2k2CdZ5455SDhyM38spiPc2F7Y1Fg_1XNaK4MnFemWHXrd3eO3qPP-HEsm5HNzM2FqQWaHpVDc0CmTqQXoTJThrLiTA2vGGw1fo5kdHSg0G7b1kcvV9hi0L7I74kkK8uLpU56Yxq8-67RAlGSmQVEwgclvT9pDRQr4Wjfzw5U5jUyKw8Y-ItKw5srLlfRrhgtvjk4VKcDwekMhNDajfOW38WEubMFcE8dibvs11Gj5x6lnWA584bRfP2LrRZRx9aerZ6UHKptw-Zhj3XBVDU1dVBm_)**

I wasn't afraid to call out the Democrats' despicable treatment of Justice Brett Kavanaugh, and I won't let them turn these hearings into another ridiculous circus broadcast nationwide.

Every minute I spend making sure Judge Barrett gets a fair and honest hearing is a minute I can't spend defending myself from the Democrats' attacks.

**[I hope I can count on you again.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=31a3fdc172444ddb8a52f54b493bc03f&_e=oQcCeT2fE4T-oa_0ADYuFD8m_-IRg9RQlhj8fMkQioa-EdUeuOGkHRlRH0XAFzfIyxi9fisCQqR7AL2CTHjFoBTUQxhemw0X1DCWsC2k2CdZ5455SDhyM38spiPc2F7Y1Fg_1XNaK4MnFemWHXrd3eO3qPP-HEsm5HNzM2FqQWaXr1sOJ9HtC6qcnO9VFLiZSos4r1QYoY5gD47_-chsajA9aUSPnSoFrKWOF7UDRi3ccb0IFxPOCLTOaNtciGtaY4tGi0Fkx2S5k7B9HiHJYoGxh0vRBGDVKkou2PLa9ge5geqkFEp-a8MdBak1ew9K3a7FFWknVyIk0AVvIceWCBCGxKU36dFZg6aikUEfsZB55cAn5pGRjGND6mAS7WEi)** There's too much at stake to lose.

clean_body: This isn’t about Obamacare; it’s about the rule of law! This isn't about Obamacare; it's about the rule of law! | Peter, The radical Left is working with the Democrats in the U.S. Senate to hijack Judge Amy Coney Barrett's nomination hearing, and I won't stand for it. This hearing isn't about Obamacare. It's not about President Trump. And it's not about the Democrats' grievances with our duly-elected Republican Senate majority. Pure and simple, this hearing is about the rule of law - something the Democrats seem to attack whenever things don't go their way. Just look at the violent protests in the streets these last few months! The same Radical Leftists who've hijacked these hearings are pouring $100 million into my opponent's campaign, While I'm chairing these hearings and doing the job I was elected to do, my opponent is free to campaign and raise money in these final days of the campaign. It seems like every day a new liberal group I've never even heard of launches another million-dollar attack ad against me. | | | | | | | I wasn't afraid to call out the Democrats' despicable treatment of Justice Brett Kavanaugh, and I won't let them turn these hearings into another ridiculous circus broadcast nationwide. Every minute I spend making sure Judge Barrett gets a fair and honest hearing is a minute I can't spend defending myself from the Democrats' attacks. There's too much at stake to lose. Thank you, Lindsey Graham | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER FOR U.S. SENATE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, OCTOBER 15, 2020
MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE ENDORSES KELLY LOEFFLER FOR U.S. SENATE
ATLANTA - Today, Marjorie Taylor Greene, future Congresswoman for the 14th Congressional District, endorsed Kelly Loeffler in the race for her United States Senate seat.
"I decided to run for Congress to Save America and Stop Socialism. As a political outsider, successful business woman, wife and mom of three, I am fed up with business as usual in the Swamp," said Greene. "The radical Democrat party is the party of Antifa/BLM riots, abortion up until birth, gun control, and Socialism. If they get their way in November, our economy will be wrecked, our jobs will be lost, and our country will be plunged into a Socialist hellhole. Georgia refuses to let that happen!
"Over the last ten months, Kelly Loeffler has proven she is a conservative fighter by introducing and voting for legislation to end Antifa/BLM violence, Back the Blue, fighting for the unborn, protecting our Second Amendment, keeping biological men out of women's sports, and holding China accountable. As the most conservative Senator in Washington, she has sponsored legislation and fought for the key issues I care about and will be fighting for as the first Congresswoman for Northwest Georgia. That's why I'm excited to endorse my friend Kelly Loeffler for U.S. Senate, and will be voting for her in the November 3rd election!"
"I'm proud to be endorsed by Marjorie Taylor Greene in my race for U.S. Senate," said Senator Loeffler. "Like Marjorie, I'm a political outsider and conservative businesswoman--not a career politician. As the most conservative U.S. Senator with a 100 percent Trump voting record, I've fought to protect innocent life, our God-given 2nd Amendment rights, our borders and our religious liberties. And just like Marjorie, I've taken on the radical Left, cancel culture, and Fake News media--and won. Our campaign has tremendous momentum, and I look forward to continuing to shake up the status quo in Washington and delivering results for hardworking Georgians."
Marjorie Taylor Greene is the latest conservative leader to endorse Senator Loeffler, who has a strong [lead](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qyiyKQ895RyqX8q4c7UpbkFc-J1-YWWTQ5NYvmyUn_W4WfPnp-lvU15Sc8z_oDgO9ULFh6SAZKXaXrdrM_IxKZZFkJ-dVGM_R6dGBzNe-C0kM82zACD3zDhmmWN3Lll4nkWFfnxWYHwZg5Va2Ibkrk36PUXXqnmK7d7H1x5faJQ=&c=y68O4HRDds5Xb8uU-lXYzfpzvuQXis6FJew1paT-xHUEB_ClhAge8g==&ch=ZQbkvH2eQiszTFVge3FJVDWG5UcdTNnUFpM2x224KEBjGVE2JX1Yrw==) in state, local, and national endorsements. She also maintains a strong advantage in [fundraising](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qyiyKQ895RyqX8q4c7UpbkFc-J1-YWWTQ5NYvmyUn_W4WfPnp-lvU7BCM7swHFfFncFaEbjfpc7A91HPIlYZqjbx12MsYvKy_qzi0-rnz4E4bkatf15L2yVbWW1yMpmlbekAvJOQuzcHGYq-5ps0ckGmO2hEi9DR&c=y68O4HRDds5Xb8uU-lXYzfpzvuQXis6FJew1paT-xHUEB_ClhAge8g==&ch=ZQbkvH2eQiszTFVge3FJVDWG5UcdTNnUFpM2x224KEBjGVE2JX1Yrw==), [grassroots organization](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qyiyKQ895RyqX8q4c7UpbkFc-J1-YWWTQ5NYvmyUn_W4WfPnp-lvU6J8SIjXWsRXZTzWnGNUvWJKtRBkX8XkH0iSUy_77a5G2O7lZtS6g7yls5pmh3iexrOnQKrLYCsaftGx3MtY74qmR0nXJdV-dAe5ZN7K2macD-tepfqgfFk=&c=y68O4HRDds5Xb8uU-lXYzfpzvuQXis6FJew1paT-xHUEB_ClhAge8g==&ch=ZQbkvH2eQiszTFVge3FJVDWG5UcdTNnUFpM2x224KEBjGVE2JX1Yrw==), and latest [polls](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qyiyKQ895RyqX8q4c7UpbkFc-J1-YWWTQ5NYvmyUn_W4WfPnp-lvUyNfeTwKykXVukPs-lv4z0hWybE6av1Yuqo_YwpUiL0Ve0v-bnOXkKZ7_rRKMT88ab11ZQre-B8wpnD3uDWIdXVhhtqnUeLA3OdaGzNAcaCuQp6Bj9S0xvQ=&c=y68O4HRDds5Xb8uU-lXYzfpzvuQXis6FJew1paT-xHUEB_ClhAge8g==&ch=ZQbkvH2eQiszTFVge3FJVDWG5UcdTNnUFpM2x224KEBjGVE2JX1Yrw==) on her race.

Peter,
Tennessee has more registered voters than ever before - over 4.4 million for this election! Now it's our job to make sure they show up to the polls and cast their ballots. We want to see record numbers, and for that we need your help.
Early voting is underway and there are less than 3 weeks until Election Day. Tonight at midnight is our last mid-month fundraising deadline, and we need to raise another $8,240. Every penny will go towards voter turnout, and making sure Democrats win every seat possible. The TNDP team across the state has done an incredible job of urging voters to make a plan to vote - now we need the resources to get them to the polls.
In an election as important as this, every vote matters. We could have more Tennesseans voting for Democrats in this election than in any election on record – but only with your support. Will you please donate, if you can afford to, and help us reach our goal to cover costs for voter turnout? [http://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]

name: My Faith Votes
subject: TONIGHT: Lift Up America Event
body:
| | A virtual evening of worship and inspiration for your whole family Peter, Tune in this evening, **_Thursday, October 15, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT_** , for a much-needed night of inspiration and worship. We will discuss religious freedom, the importance of the Christian vote, and why Christians today should be encouraged as we stand boldly for the Gospel in the public square. The band Revenant Worship and Christian music artist Matt Hammitt will lead us in a special time of worship. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRATDXrIlvSZ3r5n9MckCOh8Qv8c94KHDtlkm6WVVRhn&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015com01&n=1) This nonpartisan event is perfect for your family, church, small group, or co-workers. At a time when our nation is divided and people feel hopeless, this gathering filled with worship and words of encouragement is especially needed. Watch the event streamed live at [https://www.myfaithvotes.org/lift-up-america.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRATDXrIlvSZ3r5n9MckCOh8Qv8c94KHDtlkm6WVVRhn&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015com01&n=2) [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iRATDXrIlvSZ3r5n9MckCOh8Qv8c94KHDtlkm6WVVRhn&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015com01&n=3) **Pray. Think. Vote.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015com01&n=4)
---
* * *
You subscribed [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) to receive email updates from My Faith Votes. Our goal is to provide valuable content that equips you to prayerfully and thoughtfully take action in the public square. To update your subscription preferences or unsubscribe, click below.

[Update Subscription Preferences or Unsubscribe](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015com01&n=5)

© 2020 My Faith Votes, 10940 S Parker Rd, #640, Parker, CO 80134, United States

name: =?utf-8?Q?Hannah=20=2D=20Team=20Dani?=
subject: Something that matters
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/2545366bf3bc/something-that-matters?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | My name is Hannah and I feel very lucky to be a part of #TeamDani!

I grew up in Northern Illinois and moved away for about a year to go to school on the other side of the country. During that time, I quickly realized how much I missed the kindness that characterizes my hometown. People here are always quick to flash you a cheesy smile and engage in a conversation about the things they’re passionate about.**I have not been able to find anywhere else that is home to as many genuinely loving and hardworking people as the communities throughout this district.**

I am a Political Science and Sociology student with dreams of working in the legal field as a public defender. Quite frankly, I can’t remember a time before I was passionate about the role of public service.

**One of my clearest childhood memories is from the first Obama campaign when my older sister pulled me away from my coloring book, sat me down in front of our living room TV, and made me watch the Presidential debates, because in her words, “No excuses. This matters.” **

Since then, I have begun to understand the weight of that statement on a much deeper level. We can get lost in the monotony of the day-to-day, but when something matters, there can be no excuses. That was the reason I initially joined the Dani for Illinois Campaign.

This election year is going to be life changing for so many who have been marginalized under the current Administration.**This election matters.** We have to take action for something much bigger than ourselves while we still have the chance to change things. That’s why I chose to intern for Dani’s campaign - she understands the bigger picture and is committed to doing something that matters.

Can you commit to helping us?
* [Donate](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=828134c2ed&e=140a9b81e7)
* [Volunteer ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=e94f23ff47&e=140a9b81e7)(from home!)
* [Call voters on Election Day](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=238abd3c9a&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks,
Hannah

body:
The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | [](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_W--1vu7jZgJudlPxGcHB3hnrCqIxgzsDtdzPM396-UiIn-rDr9PhYFZqemARzMn03J_dACrW1WUPQPu5aJ_TmWOKNxFck5PALr5I487LBEuxCatSCM52dN9gT3ObTyZFxCGXoFsHGxuVRqwn_jCQfhizeHLkbP4KcmTp9H5W4UltIv8NDDVHTX8dNKeLh_QygywGTK24z8XrosTnHOmE4w%3D%3D)
---
Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_maEnqS1SAAd1kDYKHSzhI4QNw4qDX5Y4JuSdomEPLWG7J9Qq2sQUpJxBQFHG4TWBT8ujL-2tkB-yqwNPdgDlER2yfBPfkvGD5qAKLT3GiDj79zhUMbdJIrBRH9zrWhxzykIlJzgvdkUYrvgocwYmhsVEVCktEhkWe0h1jXilxnKv1wzAfqenDCEyFvZq9ROA-KiDmlS7iLMLz4bAKHHNZg%3D%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_ZXWnmyVdZPjlcFdS14aGx68_fD3MwV2_u0SPldhOyD6ITzRLpiW9tJZP1SHHAsa9JqQcmINDkcisrwsr4CZJf4XU2a3P0-zYvJrSWcubjREgtPookvVdRLFIIq2JfAKkI5vLr-_eSPmj_DN14gawhsFhXzFuo1KRwuX5rjFHeOMvmMbSfza2DD6K60D6U4TNmBJk9_zSRI7pYxxbbBPzBQ%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_GgOqIrazMxVTxhmeNG6bsgzFQWF-U0Hqrx9C_fHOz7QWmSbb8KpshRWgNc76PQBtHRqjFI5NBtn5iAcpRlhDq2X9Z75tjQ1BgLraNovj9jBvTHPA48PPFareM_dq0dXjapq899UB1j4DuyDsUKrpCMDe4iJ4VwPFzpQM4bkIbObi7LgmMPFvcDTXnwt7CqRJFdFMXp62VEeV6HFO6Semmw%3D%3D)
---

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_JypNR8D-ue-lx7fz67jcHLTtFr7VctchM8BOIQ2poiW7BV4-5pc0Gn7jb3JmtcB9NmnBTCTGQCGtrrtxy8JBandNp52tRuaIOCPXS2cFzukSiHMYFXBlZosu99g9otb_304bxWDhbV9PC5BE60WEaYyHb_YakRC2D3TxSMcdZClpWDJREQv6qOgS2ss9Q1VuN8mXYywRACIz4rcRte-55w%3D%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_eufwKW8ipuJnY-yvPhYiXic2ZUlhRgoZ88tSxnCj58KLAx_0lzyBfVUvOnKJXnTyMxyuwT2LLCCCweaKTxDltSzOt5x2SgAXpMp1s1E8mgZy7CuzBUHRuiGgzAd_tgbGVZ_UMV0kGvoEYRGMrX8MNpLKImr2DB2DIInWaFGL8UanQ61l63ppza-SAmSHa7yJKEx1WoXsRaydK4IsUTKZqQ%3D%3D)
---

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_u9PAepNvIECQtfUxLObe8v3_X1YaQ8eCXReuh_gYis_66muCyCaYfkf-rYMG9fgbx7I5Jmha4FjXlVbgXZiIDkpBk5-GVZc0-RYl_V9kkg7nIhkC6JR7O0-LxuAa_BsO447LCQbe19yXkbb5nPfFibXRdqlDWVthHY7jLZ0WyK9B4-iSPmPHJ8fhBXl27hI2elgljAJCq_A1XEfrTA14tQ%3D%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=c8a4700e9c0547489baf1fcc2082b9b4&_e=ih0YKi_Mm13NDJUKO85Xw9WfEVgFLU5LPk1T_-ESFUEsgwDUQhpC3Q0q5dDFUzCqUXZQBI00CffiWe8zvs61LZgJD2xQsrlHwGXBGN0zCFEj9qQhHLJdIwqqfPTJLBCUeaKb-BsUlDMif7uNWW6wH9ohJz_GAAOaGWcAaH4wVOEASPS4t0peaFfv2Cfq4TA_12odoQZGlL8GCM1Jky5MHbcApsaVOJsv_Pke8mITg5VysdsmJfD922hZL_oR92NEIpbKWXdbdedol8tESbO5Jdy6k-7mcCn8hm8GlUXrVTH2CksHCgJQlC-dilOO2I3irLTlScbOLJxXvSC7X8VAZIvdbxD0REDmGfHX2luQnbsnbEP5lepkhTZqMv_Z6lfNardWqQ-oA6B-7-hZ4TewtQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | Hey Peter, I’m going to cut right to the chase. We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana. It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. | Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents. The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. name: True the Vote
subject: NEW Podcast: The Signal, the Noise, the Election, and YOU
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=267A573A20A2639)
---
| | |
---
| | This week on Red White & True News... The Signal, the Noise, the Election, and YOU
---
| | In the latest episode of the [Red White & True News podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=267A573A20A2651), Catherine Engelbrecht discusses the chaos in our current election, how we got into this big mess in the first place, and what is necessary to fix the problems we face. She talks about the power of the citizen _–_ the power to vote _–_ which, when we use it wisely, can improve our own lives and the lives of those around us.

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=267A573A20A2651)
---
| | Without a doubt, this election is shaping up to be a historic turning point in American history. Catherine tells you the good, the bad, and the ugly about what we can expect. The bottom line is: everyone must be prepared for whatever comes. If you haven't already, please go to [truethevote.org](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=267A573A20A2641) and learn about how you can get involved in your local election process. We are calling all patriots to stand up for their country and fight for a safe and secure election!

Click below to listen or [watch a video of the podcast](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=267A573A20A2651) on our YouTube page.

name: Brittany Zurn
subject: My husband fell from a helicopter
body:
[ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==) Fellow Patriot, **My husband fell from a helicopter. He survived, but the man I 'd loved over half my life was gone.**
My husband, U.S. Marine Corps SGT Aaron Zurn, suffered a traumatic brain injury that changed him forever.
I had known him since I was 11 years old and he was 13. We started dating in high school and the rest was history. He gave me 3 beautiful children that I stayed home to take care of while he fought for our country.
And just like that, our lives turned upside down. Aaron's injury severely and permanently damaged his brain, leaving him with the mental capacity of a 13 year old.
So I became his full time caregiver and went back to school to become a teacher. It wasn't always easy. I didn't always know if or how we would make ends meet.
I didn't always know how I was going to pay Aaron's medical bills, put food on the table and keep a roof over our heads.
But I was never going to stop trying. I was never going to give up. Because the Aaron I married never would have either. [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==) And then, our lives changed forever again -- but this time, it was a blessing greater than I could have ever imagined.
**Operation FINALLY HOME surprised us with a mortgage free home, custom-built to accommodate Aaron 's injuries.** [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==) That's from the day they told us the news.
I was so overwhelmed. You can see the joy on all of our faces. **[And I want to tell you about another family like mine you can share this joy with today ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==)**
U.S. Army First Lieutenant Eric Benson was a fighter, just like my husband. In 2003, he came within 100 yards of losing his life to a vehicle explosion.
This wasn't a standard improvised explosive device (IED) -- it leveled an entire building.
As a result, Eric had a traumatic brain injury and other medical complications that made it hard for him to get around. Years later, he ultimately had to get a wheelchair.
Eric's wife Caira has become his full time caretaker, like I did for Aaron 10 years ago.
**[Today, I hope you'll find it in your heart to bless this family with a custom-built, mortgage free home to call their own.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==)** Because the Bensons didn't let their hardships let them lose sight of the bigger picture.
Their hardships have only made them that much more grateful to be alive, and drove them to devote their time and energy to serving their communities.
They've sacrificed so much for you and me.
**And through Operation FINALLY HOME, you can thank them with a gift they 'll never forget. ** Dan Wallrath, founded Operation FINALLY HOME 15 years ago to provide severely wounded, ill, or injured veterans and widows of the fallen with the #1 most impactful "Thank You" they could ever receive from the American people...
...specially adapted, mortgage-free homes to call their own.
Dan saw the plight of our veterans who came home from Iraq and Afghanistan with brain injuries, without limbs, with severe burns, and much more.
Often these brave warriors can't dress themselves, get up and down stairs on their own, or remember simple tasks -- never mind secure a job that can pay the rent and put food on the table for their families.
That's why Operation FINALLY HOME builds these miracle homes to accommodate each veteran's specific injuries to make everyday tasks easier. **[And that's why I hope you'll lend a helping hand to the Bensons today.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==)**
* If a veteran needs all the family bedrooms on the first floor so he or she can get to their toddler more quickly on their prosthetic legs - they give it to them.
* If a veteran who's lost his legs and arms - or both - needs a motorized lift to get in and out of the tub without the help of a spouse or parent - they do it.
* If a veteran needs a plain, dark room to retreat to when everyday sights and sounds trigger PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder) episodes filled with the screams of their wounded platoon mates - they build it.

Whatever a veteran needs to live the rest of their lives as independently as possible, they provide it.
And they gift the home to the deserving family 100% mortgage-free so a severely wounded veteran never has to spend another anguished night worrying, "How will I ever take care of my family again?"
But Operation FINALLY HOME doesn't do this life-changing work alone.
#1. Dan's first step in providing a mortgage-free, specially adapted home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran is to find a builder who's willing to donate his services free of charge.
#2. Then Dan turns to the local community for donations of the land and building materials.
#3. Then Dan finds a family to bless with this miracle. **[#4. And the final step in building this miracle home involves you.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==)**
After finding patriots to donate the land and the bulk of the building materials, the Operation FINALLY HOME has to come up with $87,500 to finish building one home.
That certainly seems like a lot of money to me.
But Dan says he always knew that with God's help he'd be able to raise that $87,500 for each and every home. Why? Because Dan believed in the American people.
He knew if he could just find those patriots who wanted to help, they would respond like wildfire.
And that's why I'm writing to you today.
Dan and Operation FINALLY HOME have changed the lives of an amazing 225 wounded veterans and their families - including ours.
**[Will you help them build their next specially-adapted, mortgage-free home for Eric Benson and his family?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==)** Your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever amount you feel is right...
...will give U.S. Army First Lieutenant Eric Benson a home where he can navigate his wheelchair easily, reach kitchen counters to help with dinner...
...allows Eric and Caira to rest easier knowing that their family will always have a roof over their heads...
...and maybe most importantly, your tax-deductible gift to build this home, tells Eric, Caira and their five children loud and clear that you care about their sacrifice.
And that means everything to veterans.
Thank you for your time, and may God bless you.
Sincerely,
Brittany Zurn [Help Build A Mortgage-Free Home For the Benson Family](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==) [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001kmdZw8VH38lGJiPVa2k_dQTfSLSC74tUWOmX3bqR4PEQ0-_yU7zbhpXdEGzb62Je4A_t_H4yIK0MG8ZZXxqJGfrQly9ffyFxsWKquKYfcbuW3S7_TcQw9Qo66ycAUW_JMUxIbtm-AOLrr7-Crallr_4tDJvvJ5J13Q1npphOO0lqv3mtUhF_VSl17S-xlXVx1dt9pxO1bnTmM5oHAe2bjJLodV5ADMQR&c=CFTN4oP50drODicx1QDrnlDrqvXm78l1HI7TTT_9PKQOfKgfHdr_VA==&ch=uTHvgjXbR5wX97pteEx7M_FuRvLjMpw1JTq8Np4hywXBKPmXyLJoEA==) Operation FINALLY HOME is a nonpartisan/nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization.

clean_body: == Fellow Patriot, My husband fell from a helicopter. He survived, but the man I 'd loved over half my life was gone. My husband, U.S. Marine Corps SGT Aaron Zurn, suffered a traumatic brain injury that changed him forever. I had known him since I was 11 years old and he was 13. We started dating in high school and the rest was history. He gave me 3 beautiful children that I stayed home to take care of while he fought for our country. And just like that, our lives turned upside down. Aaron's injury severely and permanently damaged his brain, leaving him with the mental capacity of a 13 year old. So I became his full time caregiver and went back to school to become a teacher. It wasn't always easy. I didn't always know if or how we would make ends meet. I didn't always know how I was going to pay Aaron's medical bills, put food on the table and keep a roof over our heads. But I was never going to stop trying. I was never going to give up. Because the Aaron I married never would have either. == And then, our lives changed forever again -- but this time, it was a blessing greater than I could have ever imagined. Operation FINALLY HOME surprised us with a mortgage free home, custom-built to accommodate Aaron 's injuries. == That's from the day they told us the news. I was so overwhelmed. You can see the joy on all of our faces. == U.S. Army First Lieutenant Eric Benson was a fighter, just like my husband. In 2003, he came within 100 yards of losing his life to a vehicle explosion. This wasn't a standard improvised explosive device (IED) -- it leveled an entire building. As a result, Eric had a traumatic brain injury and other medical complications that made it hard for him to get around. Years later, he ultimately had to get a wheelchair. Eric's wife Caira has become his full time caretaker, like I did for Aaron 10 years ago. == Because the Bensons didn't let their hardships let them lose sight of the bigger picture. Their hardships have only made them that much more grateful to be alive, and drove them to devote their time and energy to serving their communities. They've sacrificed so much for you and me. And through Operation FINALLY HOME, you can thank them with a gift they 'll never forget. Dan Wallrath, founded Operation FINALLY HOME 15 years ago to provide severely wounded, ill, or injured veterans and widows of the fallen with the #1 most impactful "Thank You" they could ever receive from the American people... ...specially adapted, mortgage-free homes to call their own. Dan saw the plight of our veterans who came home from Iraq and Afghanistan with brain injuries, without limbs, with severe burns, and much more. Often these brave warriors can't dress themselves, get up and down stairs on their own, or remember simple tasks -- never mind secure a job that can pay the rent and put food on the table for their families. That's why Operation FINALLY HOME builds these miracle homes to accommodate each veteran's specific injuries to make everyday tasks easier. == If a veteran needs all the family bedrooms on the first floor so he or she can get to their toddler more quickly on their prosthetic legs - they give it to them. If a veteran who's lost his legs and arms - or both - needs a motorized lift to get in and out of the tub without the help of a spouse or parent - they do it. If a veteran needs a plain, dark room to retreat to when everyday sights and sounds trigger PTSD (Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder) episodes filled with the screams of their wounded platoon mates - they build it. Whatever a veteran needs to live the rest of their lives as independently as possible, they provide it. And they gift the home to the deserving family 100% mortgage-free so a severely wounded veteran never has to spend another anguished night worrying, "How will I ever take care of my family again?" But Operation FINALLY HOME doesn't do this life-changing work alone. #1. Dan's first step in providing a mortgage-free, specially adapted home for a severely wounded, ill, or injured veteran is to find a builder who's willing to donate his services free of charge. #2. Then Dan turns to the local community for donations of the land and building materials. #3. Then Dan finds a family to bless with this miracle. == After finding patriots to donate the land and the bulk of the building materials, the Operation FINALLY HOME has to come up with $87,500 to finish building one home. That certainly seems like a lot of money to me. But Dan says he always knew that with God's help he'd be able to raise that $87,500 for each and every home. Why? Because Dan believed in the American people. He knew if he could just find those patriots who wanted to help, they would respond like wildfire. And that's why I'm writing to you today. Dan and Operation FINALLY HOME have changed the lives of an amazing 225 wounded veterans and their families - including ours. == Your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or whatever amount you feel is right... ...will give U.S. Army First Lieutenant Eric Benson a home where he can navigate his wheelchair easily, reach kitchen counters to help with dinner... ...allows Eric and Caira to rest easier knowing that their family will always have a roof over their heads... ...and maybe most importantly, your tax-deductible gift to build this home, tells Eric, Caira and their five children loud and clear that you care about their sacrifice. And that means everything to veterans. Thank you for your time, and may God bless you. Sincerely, Brittany Zurn == == Operation FINALLY HOME is a nonpartisan/nonprofit 501(c)(3) organization. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. ==** (C) Operation FINALLY HOME | == 1659 State Highway 46 West, Suite 115-606, New Braunfels, TX 78132 == | | Operation FINALLY HOME | 1659 State Highway 46 West, Suite 115-606, New Braunfels, TX 78132 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKOeokyXxjDJEL_qLi55pUIfpExRerwysp5UdUaBu-5lo5x9jJLjJ0ZqAacXt8dgv9TQztAR8PsNMYSWtbFkynBdYbBvGoVjimVmrNYMHAKfWU1kCoZ5ylh5vsY3bRjQ9r-iMqM77EdUbiR59TsDkOHswe_ksgTQuCcq75QicpfblS4nmiu297cBaGjPJfPiETS1bKuQrXD1nJOJ_gIBK9m6t_yTKJko14Y5y5Bal0JMOoTAjIsPUNHpRJcg8wqKCpGu3rBE-TE1hbUZbtcCJ3u3HyVYtq9KB6xk41NmuREDqKg4RXLlOg==&c=TtcqZ_9TTCKoPwwV1zLa5RWDF9LsU6vBioGgKGJo9IM-am-EFOeYDA==&ch=PHtSOnKiDoKmVAPROJkdUEoVOaYG95622SZk_YPXawLiiGHeelKiLg==)

Friend,
---
I wanted to share my latest campaign ad with you.
---
**_It 's about my mom._**
---
Growing up, my mother was the strongest person I knew.
---
She was at home while her 3 children were deployed to combat zones, and her faith and courage gave me the strength I needed to complete my mission and return home.
---
_Her strength has inspired me to start a new mission, one of service before self, and country before politics. Now I want every voter in TX-07 to hear that story._
---
[**Please watch the ad for yourself and then make a contribution toward our $24,560 ad-buy before tonight 's ad-buy deadline at 7:15 P.M. so that we can get this up on the air to key swing voters.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKOeokyXxjDJEL_qLi55pUIfpExRerwysp5UdUaBu-5lo5x9jJLjJ0ZqAacXt8dgv9TQztAR8PsNMYSWtbFkynBdYbBvGoVjimVmrNYMHAKfWU1kCoZ5ylh5vsY3bRjQ9r-iMqM77EdUbiR59TsDkOHswe_ksgTQuCcq75QicpfblS4nmiu297cBaGjPJfPiETS1bKuQrXD1nJOJ_gIBK9m6t_yTKJko14Y5y5Bal0JMOoTAjIsPUNHpRJcg8wqKCpGu3rBE-TE1hbUZbtcCJ3u3HyVYtq9KB6xk41NmuREDqKg4RXLlOg==&c=TtcqZ_9TTCKoPwwV1zLa5RWDF9LsU6vBioGgKGJo9IM-am-EFOeYDA==&ch=PHtSOnKiDoKmVAPROJkdUEoVOaYG95622SZk_YPXawLiiGHeelKiLg==)

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKOeokyXxjDJEL_qLi55pUIfpExRerwysp5UdUaBu-5lo5x9jJLjJ0ZqAacXt8dgv9TQztAR8PsNMYSWtbFkynBdYbBvGoVjimVmrNYMHAKfWU1kCoZ5ylh5vsY3bRjQ9r-iMqM77EdUbiR59TsDkOHswe_ksgTQuCcq75QicpfblS4nmiu297cBaGjPJfPiETS1bKuQrXD1nJOJ_gIBK9m6t_yTKJko14Y5y5Bal0JMOoTAjIsPUNHpRJcg8wqKCpGu3rBE-TE1hbUZbtcCJ3u3HyVYtq9KB6xk41NmuREDqKg4RXLlOg==&c=TtcqZ_9TTCKoPwwV1zLa5RWDF9LsU6vBioGgKGJo9IM-am-EFOeYDA==&ch=PHtSOnKiDoKmVAPROJkdUEoVOaYG95622SZk_YPXawLiiGHeelKiLg==)**

When I fought for America, I fought for unity and peace.
---
The destruction that has run rampant in the streets of our great cities these last few months absolutely breaks my heart -- this is not America.
---
America is the land of the free, and the home of the brave. It is where dreams come true and anything is possible.
---
We must reclaim the American Dream in this country: one of goodness, prosperity, and respect for one another.
---
That's why I've set forth on a new mission, and that's why I'm asking you to help get my message on the air.

[**So please, watch the ad for yourself and then make a contribution toward our $24,560 ad-buy before tonight 's ad-buy deadline at 7:15 P.M. so that we can get this up on the air to key swing voters.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QKOeokyXxjDJEL_qLi55pUIfpExRerwysp5UdUaBu-5lo5x9jJLjJ0ZqAacXt8dgv9TQztAR8PsNMYSWtbFkynBdYbBvGoVjimVmrNYMHAKfWU1kCoZ5ylh5vsY3bRjQ9r-iMqM77EdUbiR59TsDkOHswe_ksgTQuCcq75QicpfblS4nmiu297cBaGjPJfPiETS1bKuQrXD1nJOJ_gIBK9m6t_yTKJko14Y5y5Bal0JMOoTAjIsPUNHpRJcg8wqKCpGu3rBE-TE1hbUZbtcCJ3u3HyVYtq9KB6xk41NmuREDqKg4RXLlOg==&c=TtcqZ_9TTCKoPwwV1zLa5RWDF9LsU6vBioGgKGJo9IM-am-EFOeYDA==&ch=PHtSOnKiDoKmVAPROJkdUEoVOaYG95622SZk_YPXawLiiGHeelKiLg==)

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana. The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. name: Bill Olson
subject: The Dems are going too far!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

Hi Peter,

It's insane how much the Dems have gone crazy over Judge Amy Coney Barrett being nominated to the Supreme Court- but we will stop Nancy Pelosi and the Dems from derailing her nomination!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet who dominated my primary and willwin alongside President Trump in my Florida swing district

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA
!

What the far Left did to Justice Kavanaugh, assassinating the character of that good and decent man, was criminal and should have been prosecuted.

What they are doing to Judge Barrett is arguably worse!

Now understand: Judge Barrett's intellect and credentials are impeccable. I am thoroughly enjoying watching her school all of the liberal political hacks on the Judicial Committee.

The defining moment came when she was asked to show her notes for the hearing:

When Judge Amy Coney Barrett displayed that she was not using notes during Tuesday's Supreme Court confirmation hearing, the moment became just one of a few to go viral.

Conservatives applauded Barrett, calling her "THAT smart", but the moment also brought forth a wave of memes from both sides of the political aisle.

When Barrett cited various judges, cases, and laws as she discussed her career and how she would rule on the Supreme Court during the second day of her confirmation hearings, she did it all from memory.

As Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, started to question Barrett, he asked her to hold up the notebook sitting in front of her, noting most senators had multiple books and notebooks to reference.

That's right- Judge Barrett really IS that bright. She'll do a wonderful job on the Supreme Court.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

But then came the extremist Senator from Hawaii, "Crazy Mazie" Hirono.

She represents Hawaii, which is all but a single-party state. Look, she’s an attack dog. She says whatever the party feeds her, albeit she doesn’t do it well. In fact, she’s quite a disaster scene. Yet, there is one question that she says will be asked of all nominees to our courts, and that is if they ever committed sexual assault or harassment in their history. It’s a total pandering move. And you look abjectly stupid when you ask someone, like Judge Amy Coney Barrett, if she was ever accused of such behavior.

Then again, it’s Mazie. And yes, she did ask Judge Barrett if she raped anyone upon becoming a legal adult.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

If asking a Catholic mother of seven is somehow the "new normal", that's a good reason not to elect another Democrat ever again.

If Nancy Pelosi's threatening to pack the court if a Republican nominee goes through is the "new normal", that's a good reason to take the gavel out of her hands!

Are you a patriot like me, who just wants NORMAL normal? Then I need your help to beat the far Left!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

Trump needs Florida, and Florida is in play. My district is a key swing district that has been held by the Republicans this decade, but is currently held by Pelosi sycophant Darren Soto.

If we take it back, Pelosi won't be Speaker, and Trump will win Florida. It's a must-win!

I need your help to stand up AGAINST Pelosi and the nutty liberals!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA
today? We need to stay up on TV in the Orlando area- and we need your help this week, immediately, to do that!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=gaIWZaabgF6OuRU&b=Fu5BMsmsb5lyZWAME.8LgA
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

subject: Deadline
body:
Friend, We have a critical FEC reporting deadline upon us. Right now, all eyes are on Texas as a massive influx of LIBERAL cash invades the Lone Star State.
As we near the end of this race, we are required to report our finances to the FEC more often which means more opportunities for Chuck Schumer to peer into our coffers and go on the attack if he spots weakness.
Schumer, Pelosi, and their Far-Left radicals are trying to fundamentally transform our state. Having invested MILLIONS of dollars already, they now think Texas is up for grabs.
Last quarter our Far-Left opponent announced that she raised over $13 MILLION from the radical left.
[**We need to make up some ground and we need to do it fast. Can I count on you to make a 800% MATCHED donation before this important deadline?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuJgN-yXRfOaMvYZUa8QfVDZku9gcpJsbE6TspJUNdEI8lgXhI2aV7DLJlggwtuHmraCiiBlu9TGvckferIRk4xoXX0yTo8Q-rs0VZ0sdIhJlxBQTAay3jQd_eZCTWEbRsS3UtEkJXx737cDd13Ljqo4UyKlMMxdH4IEj2AkF0j21-ZLn7RhPZ-N7nEU45XLGcNmN1DIA7YOImhkHwhybIGsUtgjeLDqJaDHJoU0gI2wwuhrDUVOJntXA3DaE390Z5c6dtVU4QZlcpXC3--x2ST15HXN8XCQ4IwOcVRnOf14IZ2zr_sWE9TD1ASIxCuQd9A==&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==) **FEC Deadline** Goal: $100,000
8X Match: **ACTIVATED** [**CONTRIBUTE**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuJgN-yXRfOaMvYZUa8QfVDZku9gcpJsbE6TspJUNdEI8lgXhI2aV7DLJlggwtuHmraCiiBlu9TGvckferIRk4xoXX0yTo8Q-rs0VZ0sdIhJlxBQTAay3jQd_eZCTWEbRsS3UtEkJXx737cDd13Ljqo4UyKlMMxdH4IEj2AkF0j21-ZLn7RhPZ-N7nEU45XLGcNmN1DIA7YOImhkHwhybIGsUtgjeLDqJaDHJoU0gI2wwuhrDUVOJntXA3DaE390Z5c6dtVU4QZlcpXC3--x2ST15HXN8XCQ4IwOcVRnOf14IZ2zr_sWE9TCXDflHGPjD-A==&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==) Friend, we know what awaits us if the radical left takes over the Senate majority.
* Packing the Supreme Court.
* Higher Taxes.
* Ending the filibuster.

They have made it absolutely clear how they plan to implement a Far-Left agenda. They won't let anything stop them from packing the court and raising taxes.
Friend, these policies would be absolutely devastating for not only Texas, but the entire country.
The status of our race was just downgraded by the Cook Political Report, meaning they are less confident we will hold on to Texas. Friend, the Far-Left is salivating at the opportunity to flip Texas. We can't let that happen.
**[Will you STOP the Far-Left and defend Texas?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuJgN-yXRfOaMvYZUa8QfVDZku9gcpJsbE6TspJUNdEI8lgXhI2aV7DLJlggwtuHmraCiiBlu9TGvckferIRk4xoXX0yTo8Q-rs0VZ0sdIhJlxBQTAay3jQd_eZCTWEbRsS3UtEkJXx737cDd13Ljqo4UyKlMMxdH4IEj2AkF0j21-ZLn7RhPZ-N7nEU45XLGcNmN1DIA7YOImhkHwhybIGsUtgjeLDqJaDHJoU0gI2wwuhrDUVOJntXA3DaE390Z5c6dtVU4QZlcpXC3--x2ST15HXN8XCQ4IwOcVRnOf14IZ2zr_sWE9TCxFIHEbrFooA==&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==)**
John Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas
228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER

The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law.

Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election.

The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.

Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.
4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund.

The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on [Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuESxmR5L72pislVdtL7D74y30nRxyTx611S20OR1HkmJAv375qjUayLHXClPF9bviyc5CjdQxocg0zXO4DntT1qLeIYDwOURzQxXNM9rf1w-IMmhWaKRf9g=&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==) and [Twitter](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuGCkr2CH74Rd_LiJeCdKvHZ7O9O3e0di0-mv-Huev0NWm1MiMs3wqAMKOufJPgbLbtur9LhI1zR3rE3KxJ_APaphI53c3Bs3kgeHrvdXH92R&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==) that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn [this song](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuESxmR5L72pivRZbG8DQ8pgbZT7K3XY-PhmjWRIuO7vfERNnT8v9q-oJSkTU7c4QFPIjNxyNxHQ71oriHfZHDiMtrXyeEHBuB1XRPtXdu9j13pwPjyYjsjq-k7pm3aOXLA==&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==) up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our [volunteer page](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001raZo1t1t5PFL5eJXagWyMq2gZcG2RUES6QXm-0yxXiPsJtYh5OrvuEEt64XGC8h1Izz50nSz5LizGw3i794u1VEZKPWg4b96u_d0aVzZPqBZECET823_D5m4uNOjfGkk0l3RdXCVBHbvRU_HYLEbtIyzc46I7EmkAEXKCqfYou9C2GIRll3VULBlgcsBHN_hTcz8YHe1GmUvpVix_RO9_wEDKRSOHYdT3WwcuKOJEtCqfr107Rma8Dx002gO9Xa3XzYX6rbsz9J5jEBIDezecc6GGRZaVWFFKaQWHQie4oAR3coKfPhomg==&c=qojCLg_OEMw4tpxFtYO1iK0bs9GTB7_5_nMTN81qLfOLPCH7cXoOcQ==&ch=-Xaq-fXtwz6BKKewuopGxYkC5U5GIivKXlF3Mmuz1ayjWrMxd4OLpw==) and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible.

Schumer, Pelosi, and their Far-Left radicals are trying to fundamentally transform our state. Having invested MILLIONS of dollars already, they now think Texas is up for grabs. Last quarter our Far-Left opponent announced that she raised over $13 MILLION from the radical left. == FEC Deadline Goal: $100,000 8X Match: ACTIVATED == Friend, we know what awaits us if the radical left takes over the Senate majority. Packing the Supreme Court. Higher Taxes. Ending the filibuster. They have made it absolutely clear how they plan to implement a Far-Left agenda. They won't let anything stop them from packing the court and raising taxes. Friend, these policies would be absolutely devastating for not only Texas, but the entire country. The status of our race was just downgraded by the Cook Political Report, meaning they are less confident we will hold on to Texas. Friend, the Far-Left is salivating at the opportunity to flip Texas. We can't let that happen. ==** John Cornyn Paid for by the Cornyn Majority Texas, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, and the Republican Party of Texas. Cornyn Majority Texas 228 South Washington Street, Suite 115, Alexandria, VA 22314 CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS DISCLAIMER The CORNYN MAJORITY TEXAS (JFC) is a joint fundraising committee composed of: Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc., Alamo PAC, Republican Party of Texas, and NRSC (each individually, a Committee and collectively, the Committees). Contributions or gifts to JFC, or any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. All contributions permissible under FECA, but which would cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit to a specific Committee, shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contribution that would otherwise cause a contributor to exceed any applicable Federal contribution limit or that is otherwise impermissible under FECA shall be refunded to the contributor. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participating Committee, to the extent permissible by FECA. Any contributor may make his or her contribution directly payable to any Committee participating in JFC. Any such designated contribution that causes the contributor to exceed the contribution limit to the designated Committee shall not be reallocated by JFC absent the prior written permission of the contributor as required by law. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without green cards), federal government contractors, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. No contributions to the NRSC Headquarters Account or the NRSC Legal Fund will be used to influence any federal election. The maximum an individual or a federal non-multicandidate political committee may contribute to JFC is $266,300. The maximum amount a federal multi-candidate political action committee may contribute to JFC is $120,000. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable. Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows: 1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 2. The first $5,600 from any joint individual contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $20,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $10,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $71,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a joint individual contribution up to $213,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 3. The first $2,800 from any federal non-multicandidate PAC shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to Alamo PAC. The next $35,500 shall go to the NRSC. The next $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds up to $106,500 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. 4. The first $5,000 from any federal multicandidate PAC contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $5,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. The next $5,000 shall go to the Alamo PAC. The next $15,000 shall go to the NRSC. The next $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Headquarters Account. Any remaining funds from a federal multicandidate PAC contribution up to $45,000 shall go to the NRSC Legal Fund. The contributors signature shall serve as written designation of his or her contribution to the particular elections described above. With you on board, we're one step closer to keeping Texas red and fighting to create a future we can all be proud of. On behalf of all of us, we're glad you're on board. Now that you're on Team Cornyn, make sure that you're keeping up to date with the latest news. The best way to do so? Following our campaign on == and == that way you'll always be the first to know when something important comes up. Now, if you're still reading this, we know you're really ready to stand up and protect Texas. To aid your fight, we suggest you turn == up on full volume and do anything you can to help stop the dangerous policies being pedaled by the left to oppose our president and replace our conservative Texas values. Once you're pumped up and ready to go, head over to our == and find out exactly how you can help. We'd be proud to have you join us. Thank you for all you do to support John Cornyn for Senate. Together, we can protect this great state we know and love, and promote a safe, prosperous, and healthy Texas. Contributions to Texans for Senator John Cornyn, Inc. are not tax-deductible. | | Texans for Senator John Cornyn | PO BOX 13026, Austin, TX 78711 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:

body:
If we can't meet our goal tonight, it'll spell disaster for the future of our country.

Friend,
October 15th is a critical deadline for state Republicans around the country. Where our numbers end up at midnight tonight will set the tone for the last 19 days of this race.

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. We accomplish this by working directly with Republican leadership in the states and providing them with resources, training, and funding. We have nearly 200,000 donors in all 50 states. The RSLC invested a record $45 million into state-level races in the 2017-2018 election cycle, which contributed to state-level Republicans maintaining 61 of 99 legislative chamber majorities, holding 25 lieutenant governor seats, and 29 secretaries of state offices. name: Todd Cheewing
subject: FWD: INVITATION ENCLOSED: Luncheon with Corky and Senator Tom Cotton!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MESSNER FOR SENATE
body:
Tap or click to read more >>
Peter,

Corky wrote you about this earlier in the week, and I wanted to make sure you saw your invitation. His luncheon with Sen. Tom Cotton in Bedford is quickly approaching - but it isn't too late to secure your spot!

Sen. Cotton and Corky align on many of the most important issues facing our country like economic freedom and personal liberty. He might be from Arkansas, but he embodies New Hampshire's "Live Free or Die" spirit!

Availability is limited, so don't miss out on your chance to reserve your seat at the table! _**[Just click or tap here](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/5fe392729a3674fd/e47d4f0d0bbc7756c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_.

I hope to see you there! \- Todd Cheewing | |
---

Subject: INVITATION ENCLOSED: Luncheon with Corky and Senator Tom Cotton!
