Tickets are going quickly, and _there's limited space available so don't delay!_

[_**Just click or tap here to RSVP and secure your spot**_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/5fe392729a3674fd/a5bab884adb9328fc3d6b838967d376c/33153).

\- Corky Messner

body:

| Dear Fellow American,

Today, Judicial Watch is carrying its biggest, and I happen to think most important caseload in 26 years.
It includes critically important lawsuits against agencies of the federal government... particularly the Justice and State Departments (which despite Attorney General Barr's efforts remain effectively controlled by the Deep State and continue to stonewall our lawful requests for critical documents).
So I must turn to you for additional help:
**[Can I count on you to make a special donation right now to support our work?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51731&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMTUxNDQzMDk=)**
I had hoped that the Trump administration would address unlawful government secrecy issues more aggressively...but Deep State career bureaucrats embedded in every government department are continuing to fight our transparency requests and lawsuits.
Plus, the pace of our work and calls for legal and investigative assistance we're receiving from around the country are accelerating. New challenges range from increasing threats to election integrity, to unlawful sanctuary policies, to ongoing Deep State efforts to destroy the Trump presidency and cover-up crimes committed by Hillary Clinton and other Obama administration officials.
Many concerned citizens and honest public officials are seeking our help to enforce the rule of law. And I do not want to turn away even one important corruption, open government, illegal immigration or election integrity case as demands on us are at an all-time high.
[Your additional donation now will help us make the most of the challenges and opportunities facing us](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51731&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMTUxNDQzMDk=) including:

* **Aggressively moving forward with our lawsuits (now numbering 65) exposing the Deep State conspiracy to target and destroy President Trump**.

* **Doubling our legal challenges against illegal "sanctuary" policies that unlawfully prohibit local police from cooperating with federal immigration authorities**.

* **Adding more resources to our highly successful Election Integrity Initiative to help clean the voter rolls**.

There is so much work to do which is [why I'm asking for your additional help today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51731&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMTUxNDQzMDk=). Judicial Watch is the one conservative institution in Washington that Americans can rely on to stand firm for the rule of law. Thank you!
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iRbWkH2aq7oeb--xQOd7zbyZ5pvkT6s948mnBdL_ok3T0lDqQGOnsgfC0Me19jUTZkGMX8c07oP7VSYvVDi0HQiE2Gmoz-ELxUA33cRlxygXj7uY9Pe_X1UqmhK3M80SpyvRi2k2i3KELdk8EzdB20T_6Gx_6NlmWFImofs9Jy1tV0ARc_MlMgEJqTglbgfpjaeBfYvEgn5WEcQlZAQmGZ2W6Ebaheg_7ZZ1fariMGTglxJH4P87Pzqg4xwk3klgB0Huq7--8EhPmKtiUSjXBECSSOxLX6pnNo2k_hinJZeRjsuRTptzji0DB2UvhNaPtbEDz82KCXYEE8Mz4AwXQ4rEKDmORj2QaHvwvb-DS5Kpu42yXbbCkBZKZnVdtju0a9j67b02l6nTAtOiCkXssg==&c=t9tSF46_67_S6MSeBVYWbCJA-fTGWbaBDShnGs9Eb5QPiDX3OBgh8g==&ch=j19pwaBmtNV2frcJ7ltUTOPv2-l2kIaIozIrtWFw-ol2PsK7ozOU9Q==)

Friend,

We are just hours away from the critical mid-month deadline! This is one of the FINAL deadlines before Election Day, and as of this morning, I am not on track!

I think you know how I feel about this. Donald Trump is the most corrupt President in history. Every day, his presidency further erodes democracy, threatens the vulnerable, and shifts wealth and power to the 1% — to Trump and his friends.
It’s no small matter: We must defeat Trump, and defeat him by the biggest possible margin, and that means voting for Biden.
At the same time, we cannot depend on Biden or the Democratic Party on their own to deliver the scale of change that ordinary Americans so desperately need. To end big money politics. To win a Green New Deal. To guarantee healthcare for all. We’re going to have to push them.**
Voting on the WFP ballot line is two birds with one stone: you’re helping to defeat Trump AND building the power of the progressive movement in New York.****
****We need a strong WFP to make New York into the progressive leader we know it should be --**[_****__**and that’s why I’m urging you to join me in voting on the WFP ballot line this year.**_](http://sgtr.eomail5.com/ls/click?upn=lexgV9SJBgnirUqs-2BO5Cd3VmphWj-2F4E-2B59wHLbcXjAfDGCr6gAZBGxwkv9mVaTp5QCnuKETgyOvELniM4dA-2BGC6VBYMs-2BdmdpA90emRjLyp0hw7z5ny6zuyWFdQ5vjySCtYopUfr6OOEZt8PT2ESVF91nYU8etDeHWPuzEwMGvocFnISD03SGyRv1hZqLo56rd5h_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgDMrpwH7WsBtnDLHh-2FOTSdmTcHHD-2BdCsMMmghTpyxmi9iL-2B9SuNUvSbAgPb3P2U-2BZnBcI-2Fs5a9QLmYicFCVAnDSXYq4WcB1WMxpRZ0givnQFZYD1dU4GMjc-2B-2BFA3kDT3LrIWzamqa4zkikgPE9udmLCA-2BTRb9ViSmJG-2B58GPTdETawe41W7-2FMVbiHSCycpLrNl-2Bl57rYrclqS-2BkNmvLRKEYfhF7fLoGBlgUKhf6T7xeo8KYCM7anu12JSGd1ZO2of1Sy7uGdFfSLAxzOy30R0Jv-2FCK7UqET0WC02gQ-2B9kfHNqMiB04HJW77nMIFMfjtqlgNyxLcnJeKy745rmBBVToonsM1oCLOwtAh81PnNhhcHl5SzCn948poYTHqK1Gqv0bupeACQIwJpBguNtlFumEyigkvIceG-2B5betdW3bg0LKBKpPsPzYj7z74L2yvfar99CZYPtMxJzvIehGuau6rqu-2B2H5xbjPAzaQtF6onsDB-2BkSsVimsWT7t9avM9I-2FoM3AusyzXgaNwIZvr0Br46YqZujOgJjWnKvoc0P9XeyTOyTK9mSlhZTD-2BMT4SrcRhBlQ2KM7KxEitiwctImbaiBD4CxDJOFD0b6-2Fr4QZ3ZKrlJfDIqwVAcRCGbJKkIIWRAvqjw7kagILmKvSIH4t6a1RiizN2suJFiA902fGLjj9ZkL9b3NokvP94rVJV0mo0oAhuaW9typpYtwmSSEB67sc9s8y7ik2i38ntys2gZAWAoYalLKZf6eURdDIneAXHQu37fBjIzMIxDx87zqlUac-2BCla5oP5eBp8C-2BjyFcv3-2B3y15aUbH9kFxM-2FPGX-2FBT2ELItVzOcCUXIC-2FmoRRQ7DIVJFRrzbtn0caUbtGdEEdsUg-3D-3D)_[](http://sgtr.eomail5.com/ls/click?upn=lexgV9SJBgnirUqs-2BO5Cd3VmphWj-2F4E-2B59wHLbcXjAfDGCr6gAZBGxwkv9mVaTp5QCnuKETgyOvELniM4dA-2BGC6VBYMs-2BdmdpA90emRjLyp0hw7z5ny6zuyWFdQ5vjySCtYopUfr6OOEZt8PT2ESVPlASI-2FKZXf-2FgoEZA-2FxgIBg7AoTdzzlgD-2FQCA8sZWTdCZr6yon9ch9XOlSDyvY84c3eaJqs-2FvPaIwp2K0KEiz4wu2MR4mJlkEV742JT5-2BSn3Naty_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymgDMrpwH7WsBtnDLHh-2FOTSdmTcHHD-2BdCsMMmghTpyxmi9iL-2B9SuNUvSbAgPb3P2U-2BZnBcI-2Fs5a9QLmYicFCVAnDSXYq4WcB1WMxpRZ0givnQFZYD1dU4GMjc-2B-2BFA3kDT3LrIWzamqa4zkikgPE9udmLCA-2BTRb9ViSmJG-2B58GPTdETawe41W7-2FMVbiHSCycpLrNl-2Bl57rYrclqS-2BkNmvLRKEYfhF7fLoGBlgUKhf6T7xeo8KYCM7anu12JSGd1ZO2of1Sy7uGdFfSLAxzOy30R0Jv-2FCK7UqET0WC02gQ-2B9kfHNqMiB04HJW77nMIFMfjtqlgNyxLcnJeKy745rmBBVToonsM1oCLOwtAh81PnNhhcHl5SzCn9 In New York, and increasingly across the country, the Working Families Party is one of the most powerful voices for the progressive movement, and WFP has elected dozens of progressive leaders who fight for the people, not the powerful — including massive upsets like for Jamaal Bowman.
WFP candidates beating real estate-backed incumbents in the New York State Senate is what allowed the passage of last year’s landmark tenant protections. It should come as no surprise that powerful corporate interests and the politicians who serve them in both parties don’t like that one bit.
And it’s why Governor Andrew Cuomo keeps trying to destroy the WFP: because WFP is critical to the change we’re making in New York. **_And as a result, the threshold to keep WFP’s party status is more than three times what it used to be this year, and we have to fight like hell to protect the ballot line._**
Our movement is growing. Don’t let big money blunt our momentum or take down one of our most critical organizations.**

clean_body: You’re helping to defeat Trump AND building the power of the progressive movement in New York. | | | | | | | Friends, I think you know how I feel about this. Donald Trump is the most corrupt President in history. Every day, his presidency further erodes democracy, threatens the vulnerable, and shifts wealth and power to the 1% — to Trump and his friends. It’s no small matter: We must defeat Trump, and defeat him by the biggest possible margin, and that means voting for Biden. At the same time, we cannot depend on Biden or the Democratic Party on their own to deliver the scale of change that ordinary Americans so desperately need. To end big money politics. To win a Green New Deal. To guarantee healthcare for all. We’re going to have to push them. Voting on the WFP ballot line is two birds with one stone: you’re helping to defeat Trump AND building the power of the progressive movement in New York. We need a strong WFP to make New York into the progressive leader we know it should be -- In New York, and increasingly across the country, the Working Families Party is one of the most powerful voices for the progressive movement, and WFP has elected dozens of progressive leaders who fight for the people, not the powerful — including massive upsets like for Jamaal Bowman. WFP candidates beating real estate-backed incumbents in the New York State Senate is what allowed the passage of last year’s landmark tenant protections. It should come as no surprise that powerful corporate interests and the politicians who serve them in both parties don’t like that one bit. And it’s why Governor Andrew Cuomo keeps trying to destroy the WFP: because WFP is critical to the change we’re making in New York. And as a result, the threshold to keep WFP’s party status is more than three times what it used to be this year, and we have to fight like hell to protect the ballot line. Our movement is growing. Don’t let big money blunt our momentum or take down one of our most critical organizations. When hundreds of thousands of progressives vote together on the WFP line, it’s a statement to the establishment that can’t be ignored. This is an easy one. If you’re voting for Biden in New York (and you should be!) would you rather strengthen the New York State Democratic Party (controlled by Cuomo and determined to shut out progressives) or help defend the WFP from his attacks? Solidarity, -Zephyr | | | You are receiving this email as a supporter of Zephyr Teachout and New York Progressives. If you no longer wish to receive emails from WFP, click here to at any time. Paid for by the New York State Committee of the Working Families Party. 81 Prospect St Brooklyn New York 11201 United States of America

Peter,

name: Tracy Newman, JayInslee.com
subject: Loren Culp is *not* one of us.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Loren Culp is a right-wing extremist just like Donald Trump.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8191%2E868730%2Ek7V6Ie) Friend, _"Loren Culp is one of us."_ That's what his first TV ad claims, and it's running right now to Washington voters. But does he share our values? I'm not sure about you, but I know I'm not a right-wing fixture on Fox News. No one I know proudly refuses to follow and enforce laws they don't like -- including Washington's popular voter-approved measure to strengthen background checks to prevent gun violence, which Culp has compared to Jim Crow laws, Japanese Internment, and Nazi Germany. And no one I know refuses to accept the science of COVID-19 by flat-out refusing to wear masks, endangering their own life and -- more importantly -- the lives of anyone they come in contact with. **But that's who Loren Culp is. He's a fringe extremist just like Donald Trump, and voters need to know it.** We have our own TV ads running across Washington state right now too, and ours focus on Jay's strong, decisive leadership that's made Washington fare better than others during the COVID crisis and has helped Washington become the best state to do business in and one of the best to live in. **[_That's_ a message voters need to hear: Fight back against Loren Culp and keep Jay's ads up on the air by donating $5 or more before our FINAL mid-month deadline tomorrow night.](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12915?t=4&akid=8191%2E868730%2Ek7V6Ie)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/12916?t=5&akid=8191%2E868730%2Ek7V6Ie)

Peter,

I'm Joe Collins, the black Republican and Navy veteran from South Central Los Angeles who **President Trump just endorsed to defeat radical liberal Congresswoman Maxine Waters!**

I'm running against Maxine because I'm sick and tired of watching my community suffer from her failed socialist policies while she sits in her $6 million mansion outside the district.

[**I have President Trump's support, but I need yours too in order to kick Maxine out of Congress. Will you rush $25, $50, $100 or even more to help me defeat Maxine Waters next month?**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=214f9f0e4cc6471099164eac939134fa&_e=3pOsSqHkxunIGF0WX-xGKh5rab43kmsVFeAk_b2ejRDUbIF_kBGM7WW5R3hYFhlw7RVKkVDN95ljMWrgHfEfS6JSD7a2UJVYTHyCNZTa9xVkMEQbfLzJQ1FwRNprsWonx1sETC0AzykeM6Wu1LWQKpEXh36mKnMr4kseRSq9SZqs7Hy8JPN83kVDP3FzzGMQxSoxRF3j-GFmtWavA9lpSZEzSNsMciMSS3j1ARBlEZhmydhvKjD_4Td2vvaZuPSBTHPzCD_8NdN14VaKxolAM79n57b5jWM674lexfhAGkqE19SiCL5T1qvgbnzDerRKN66loYAwBQzbwCuaay320-gEd-ylk3QJtG1S8KrDmGxNlOV34ErlkUjTqpK42j_eoXFkaSQbOok-E34jzPfvGA%3D%3D)

While in the Navy, I was deployed to a combat zone as part of Operation Iraqi Freedom. **So trust me when I say that Maxine's failed policies have made Los Angeles look like a combat zone.**

Crime, drugs, violence, poverty, homelessness, empty storefronts... this is what Maxine and the Democrats have done to LA, what they're trying to do to the rest of California, and what they will do to America unless we defeat them now.

**Maxine has never faced an opponent like me** , and in her 40+ years as a career politician she's never been in so much danger of losing as she is now.

Our grassroots campaign has already made history, but it will be all for nothing if we fall short at the finish line...

[**HELP JOE DEFEAT MAXINE »**](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=214f9f0e4cc6471099164eac939134fa&_e=3pOsSqHkxunIGF0WX-xGKh5rab43kmsVFeAk_b2ejRDUbIF_kBGM7WW5R3hYFhlw7RVKkVDN95ljMWrgHfEfS6JSD7a2UJVYTHyCNZTa9xVkMEQbfLzJQ1FwRNprsWonx1sETC0AzykeM6Wu1LWQKpEXh36mKnMr4kseRSq9SZqs7Hy8JPN83kVDP3FzzGMQ5-NzLALBg-WRiTTDhRQgil-cvutLcPkVVd1M6puE8BjBiO8lNbGZK3oEZGIULXhSkejizhnVlwBpHT6WyoWFsLL-mrmXV-hGZDOYpr8hKBGfghbEpJIVnc0hY7Q8o-P5swu0GsciQ9j4hHU0XWoeh2_aW_4_Quvkuq8ypUmY9PzKPgDsaER5ipBI2vP5bJzjc6NMnaJ7NOkh-YWBCNsgrA%3D%3D)
**President Trump knows how critical it is that we defeat Maxine Waters, and he knows _I can get the job done_ - _that's why he endorsed me this week._**

[**But we have less than 3 weeks left to finish our mission. Will you join Pres. clean_body: President Trump knows how critical it is that we defeat Maxine Waters, and he knows I can get the job done – that's why he endorsed me this week. | Peter, I'm Joe Collins, the black Republican and Navy veteran from South Central Los Angeles who President Trump just endorsed to defeat radical liberal Congresswoman Maxine Waters! I'm running against Maxine because I'm sick and tired of watching my community suffer from her failed socialist policies while she sits in her $6 million mansion outside the district. While in the Navy, I was deployed to a combat zone as part of Operation Iraqi Freedom. So trust me when I say that Maxine's failed policies have made Los Angeles look like a combat zone. Crime, drugs, violence, poverty, homelessness, empty storefronts... this is what Maxine and the Democrats have done to LA, what they're trying to do to the rest of California, and what they will do to America unless we defeat them now. Maxine has never faced an opponent like me , and in her 40+ years as a career politician she's never been in so much danger of losing as she is now. Our grassroots campaign has already made history, but it will be all for nothing if we fall short at the finish line... President Trump knows how critical it is that we defeat Maxine Waters, and he knows I can get the job done - that's why he endorsed me this week. Thank you! Joe Collins U.S. Navy Veteran Republican for Congress | | Joe Collins is a black conservative, Navy veteran, and Republican from South Central Los Angeles, and he is running to to defeat radical leftist Maxine Waters. ---|--- Joe Collins For Congress 5777 W. body:
**FIRST** : Twitter CENSORED my pro-life ad, claiming it was "inflammatory."

**THEN** : Twitter BLACKLISTED the link of an article exposing Hunter Biden using his influence to set up a meeting between a Ukrainian executive and then-Vice President Joe Biden.

**NOW** : Twitter has LOCKED the personal account of White House Press Secretary Kayleigh McEnany for trying to share the same news that the network worked so hard to bury.

Friend, there are just 20 days before the election and this level of liberal, elitist censorship is abhorrent.

Twitter's CEO claims they made a mistake in disallowing the use of the news article link, but this is clearly a desperate coverup for the social media giant's collusion with Joe Biden and the radical Left.

**Make no mistake about it -- Silicon Valley is meddling in the election.**

I fought back against Twitter -- and WON, and I'm ready to do it again. But there's much more on the line this time and I can't do it alone.

If you're enraged at the shameless attempts to obstruct Donald Trump and silence conservative voices like me, join me in my fight.

name: Steve Schale
subject: 19 Days Out. Let's go win the damn thing.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter --
I hope you are well as we enter the final stretch of this campaign. With just 19 days to go, millions of Americans are already starting to cast their ballots. I wanted to share this short memo that includes more about our current position and what we plan to do in the last couple weeks of this election.
As always, thank you for all of your support. Now let's win this thing!
Steve Schale
\---

**To: Unite Supporters and Interested Parties
From: Amanda, Julianna, Mark, Rodell, and Steve
Re: 19 Days Out. Let's go win the damn thing. **

This memo is a little bittersweet, as it will probably be our last large strategic memo of the cycle. Almost exactly one year ago, we started Unite the Country, and with your support and that of our Board Chairman, Mark Doyle, we have helped get Joe Biden over the finish line in the primaries, and to the edge of winning the Presidency. There is no way for us to properly express our gratitude but please know how much we appreciate each and every one who has stood with us in this fight.

We are finishing up the cycle by making a nearly $8 million investment in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin, as well as a nearly $3 million investment in Florida.
To explain why, let's talk about where we are.

We feel confident that the Biden math starts at a solid base of 212 electoral votes. Over the summer, we made investments in Nevada and Minnesota, and feel that along with New Hampshire, these states are now moving from a leaning Biden status to likely Biden.

**Likely Biden:**

Minnesota: 10 electoral votes (last UTC poll had Biden +11)
Nevada: 6 electoral votes (last UTC poll had Biden +10)
New Hampshire: 4 electoral votes

_This gets us to 232_.
**Upper Midwest:**

Michigan 16 electoral votes (last UTC poll had Biden +7)
Wisconsin 10 electoral votes (last UTC poll had Biden +5)
Pennsylvania 20 electoral votes (last UTC poll had Biden +5)
**Opportunities Beyond the Upper Midwest:**

Florida 29 EV*
Arizona 11 EV
North Carolina 15 EV
Georgia 16 EV
Ohio 18 EV
Iowa 6 EV
Texas 38 EV

Our bet from the very beginning has been that the more voters came to know Joe Biden, the more they would see him as a perfect antidote to the insanity of the Trump presidency. This is a theory rooted in both quantitative and qualitative research dating back to last spring, that a majority of voters in swing states had already decided they disapproved of Donald Trump's Presidency and were ready to give someone else a chance. Our qualitative research found that persuadable voters used language to describe Trump that was similar in many respects to the language used by Democrats. The questionable voters had to wrap their heads around: was Biden the alternative they could support. Ad testing confirmed this theory - and still remains true to this day: positive Biden content outperforms all other ads. Filling out this piece of the equation became our mission.

When we started the general election, we had two strategic goals - focused on the upper midwestern states:
* We used the early months before the campaign by starting to advertise heavily to raise the foundation by defining the case for replacing the President. We wanted voters to root for Joe Biden and see his interest in investing in middle class values that, which have defined his life. We also wanted to draw the line between his work for President Obama, and his vision for a new American economy during a Biden administration.
* Drills down to have more specific conversations with suburban women, labor union members, and African American voters in the key battleground states, to further define the Biden vision. We used both digital and radio in this program.
* In addition, we made a seven figure investment in Hispanic digital persuasion in South Florida prior to the Bloomberg spend, as well as spent nearly a month running a program in Arizona along with several other SuperPACs to help fill the gap as the campaign was beginning their advertising push in the key western states.
In the last ten days, we have undertaken another significant research project, as well as leaned on research from the Bloomberg and Hawkfish teams to help define our final spend. Thanks to the generosity of our donors, we have had our best six-week fundraising window of the campaign, allowing us to close the campaign with a nearly $12 million final push focused on drawing the connection between Joe Biden's life, and how his life has defined the work of a Biden administration.
In this final phase, our plans include:
* Going back on the air in Wisconsin and Pennsylvania with two ads: **[one that shows how Biden's life experience is defining his vision for America](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7714/287b9173/2b052bd1/7e7640d0/1982354043/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://youtu.be/vIckvj6jpsk")**, and one that specifically details his economic plan for a post-Trump/post-COVID America.
* Continuing our work with suburban women through both digital and direct mail programs, African American voters in the upper Midwest with a highly focused digital effort, and with our friends at BlackPAC, we are adding in a $2.5 million radio buy in Florida to help mobilize African American and Caribbean American voters around the state.
* We've also partnered with the Bloomberg team on a persuasion program to Latino and African American voters in Florida, as well as partnering with their team on an effort specifically focused on recent combat veterans.
* Finally, working with several social influencers, **[we are unveiling](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7714/287b9173/2b052bd1/7e7640d1/1982354043/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bTrPlUleGLQ")** a**[series of mobilization efforts](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7714/287b9173/2b052bd1/7e7640d2/1982354043/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fa69C1eYnC0") **aimed at helping increase awareness in the election and drive youth engagement in the closing days.
**One more thank you.**
This has been quite a journey. When we started this thing, we had one goal: support Joe Biden in any and every way possible. There were moments that were tough - like the window after Iowa and New Hampshire, moments that were unbelievably exciting - like the hard fought second place finish in Nevada that led to the sweep in South Carolina and Super Tuesday. We also were struck with tragedy during that time when we lost one of our own, our Treasurer, Larry Rasky to COVID-19.

The summer and fall were tough for everyone - as all of us - you included, have tried to balance life in the COVID world with the need to do what we needed to do to win. But through it all, you all have stood with us, trusted us, given us good counsel, asked the right questions, and ensured we had the resources to fulfill our mission.
The job isn't done. The race isn't over, and we are going to run as hard as we can through the tape. But we collectively are aware that we can't do anything if not for supporters stepping up with their resources, and for that, we will be forever grateful.

19 more days.
**_Let 's go win the damn thing_.**

* * *
Paid for by Unite the Country, [www.unitethecountry.com](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7714/287b9173/2b052bd1/7e7640d3/1982354043/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://www.unitethecountry.com"), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. Contributions to Unite the Country are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're counting on supporters like you, but if you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7714/287b9173/2b052bd1/7e7640dc/1982354043/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://https://unitethecountry.cp.bsd.net/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

name: Stephen Lawson (Team Kelly)
subject: SENATOR LOEFFLER ENDS Q3 WITH OVER $5.5 MILLION CASH ON HAND
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Georgians for Kelly Loeffler
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE THURSDAY, OCTOBER 15, 2020
SENATOR LOEFFLER ENDS Q3 WITH OVER $5.5 MILLION CASH ON HAND
ATLANTA -- Today, the Loeffler Campaign announced it has ended the third quarter of 2020 with over $5.5 million cash on hand. Overall, the Loeffler campaign reported raising $2 million during Q3 - which represents contributions from almost 10,000 supporters across the country, including 142 counties across the state.
"These third quarter fundraising numbers make it abundantly clear that our campaign has the resources, infrastructure, momentum and grassroots support needed to finish the race and deliver a big win on November 3rd," said Communications Director Stephen Lawson. "Our message is resonating because Georgia's voters want a political outsider and true conservative who knows how to deliver results, who will always fight for our conservative values, and who will never back down to the radical Left. By every metric, Kelly Loeffler has the momentum in this race - and we're excited to turn that enthusiasm into a victory on Election Day."
In addition to the campaign's substantial financial advantage, Senator Loeffler also enjoys organized grassroots [support](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXw2KSECzE6MjzWLazh--3pr_Pg-Irfsh1J9QAekAIxnzFbpdNtU-7lvDYDYWPDz88OKdO9Hxx3OHBPTwHUDVO1-kfEFGFQfdFRXhGmslnjgfS27NsySggIVc=&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) in all 159 counties, a [robust](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXw7ct4bPqHFqeNBBG69v9LOA1XCUEZtfOcWb4gRtbRMvSIX_0u0zuj8onBZ0Qf3FXXp1YqHHyBsFyRj53yGgjoN9sdVpp6LK6rhXFCRSmOpyQbJidOANhF8o=&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) voter outreach program, the [endorsement](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXw2KSECzE6MjzWLazh--3pr_Pg-Irfsh1J9QAekAIxnzFbpdNtU-7lvDYDYWPDz88OKdO9Hxx3OHBPTwHUDVO1-kfEFGFQfdFRXhGmslnjgfS27NsySggIVc=&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) of over 150 elected officials from across the state, and the [support](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXw2KSECzE6MjzWLazh--3pr_Pg-Irfsh1J9QAekAIxnzFbpdNtU-7lvDYDYWPDz88OKdO9Hxx3OHBPTwHUDVO1-kfEFGFQfdFRXhGmslnjgfS27NsySggIVc=&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) of dozens of national conservative leaders. She has a 100% pro-Trump voting [record](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXww1d-peXNjkT1C-vsC43kMPqhHZv6KSjz8Q8H5LYfhvfNvs-Im5kLuNq2ItVN7NOgUbJDqeLFLoP_NEBMYoQ3UuA3NciiSlF6Y9GeLLL3iIai8ztdrWgU4bu4VRlBbA4HmsShckaOsq9oJS2pwFpfjkzuNhnuMFzjA==&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==), has an "A" [rating](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXwxzAd1Wf9IyjbbTX20Kh4hcL_cJc_k2hn9ORhtataJLwZDFpqjYZkyVrVtxpmOgEjpY5LmsYiA9AEjRIv8GiG0UeNjvfMvzlURSOU1lhJ0uhvBu7IUTXgYs=&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) from the NRA, has been [endorsed](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXw_LWOhHASlfJDfCkE68xesQiFJxPy2v-12gYfnDYVORbV5kMu8kP7hgrYUjRXNb_Zk1n-m57JJ_MSsZUmlBMDpGPQL5I4P6sxlBdJyjXzlw3BNMAvRP8COt0jmSVEJIxA_2dd0YHGLP5JVbjz_C4v5HLyGHEyILUPsE2_AdttwOvpPrPmImA0Rs=&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) by National Right to Life, and has been [rated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UFEQqAaGqNt4Qln6YZ9KzqU0TNd0y646hE4SN-ECY6PIQzKAKEyXwxqN7rdZX94DxT9xeZYddDR230HFypkae3vTtLUmKLaw_cUp6lWF05Xf1EeBlIIGpe5hcdWjuNxcQaXzGZ5g9PitSby-68d8l5TjvErTn-uA6-yGsa5aIvIkNSfzTBPhn7tm_CCBvEnF&c=7jUpe0Vg0MPFf58Fgk0WRL3Gor_QvaLb456jyEB1cKY-sa9xUCPxpA==&ch=6pz6-aUqP8mwrYJw6_gVyke8mH94GqgmpDmBnKdAU8SSKaeJsxnFAg==) the Most Conservative Senator in America.

clean_body: Friend, Under Nancy Pelosi’s “leadership,” the House of Representatives has pushed the most disastrously left-wing agenda we ever could have imagined. Next year, Congress will need to begin the hard work of reining in the deficit, restoring support for the rule of law, and respecting your God-given rights under the Constitution (especially the 2nd Amendment, which is a particular target for assault by the Pelosi leftists up in D.C.). As you know, Abigail Spanberger simply cannot be trusted to do that work. While she promoted herself as a pragmatic “moderate” in 2018, she’s spent the last two years standing shoulder-to-shoulder with Nancy Pelosi. She’s voted with Pelosi 90% of the time , on everything from taxes to the failed impeachment hoax against President Trump. But still, Abigail Spanberger is once again running as a “moderate.” Even worse, Pelosi has dropped millions of dollars of Democrat campaign cash into central Virginia as a reward for her loyal foot-soldier. In order to take back the House, we’re triple-matching contributions made to this page TONIGHT ONLY: In case it isn’t clear just how important this race is, President Trump recently gave Nick his complete and total endorsement to help him fight back against Pelosi’s dirty millions: The President knows Nick will fight for the people of the Commonwealth to advance and defend our rights. But Friend, this race is not just about giving central Virginia a representative who will advance our agenda and defend our rights -- it’s also a crucial victory on the path to taking back the House of Representatives and removing Nancy Pelosi as Speaker. With 19 days left, . Thank you, Joe D. Nick’s Campaign Manager Paid for by Friends of Nick Freitas, Inc.

subject: MEMO: Closing the gap between us and Andy Barr
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Josh Hicks for Congress
body:
I'm going to be brief, folks. There are just 19 days until the conclusion of this election, and I need to ask for your support.

|
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20359832/256686954/-965990361?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201015memo-nd_JH_all_nd_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk0N2M3NC0yYTBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPfZ7pqF9mk5vJDBQnTqxWhQqdBTXnnaZzD4RtFGxIA=)
| | I'm going to be brief, folks. **There are just 19 days until the conclusion of this election, and[ _I need to ask for your support._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20359833/256686955/-965990361?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201015memo-nd_JH_all_nd_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk0N2M3NC0yYTBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPfZ7pqF9mk5vJDBQnTqxWhQqdBTXnnaZzD4RtFGxIA=)** If you haven’t chipped into this campaign yet, there’s no time to waste. We need to raise $51,908 (yes, that’s a real number) before Monday, October 19, at midnight to close an important fundraising gap, and we need all hands on deck. My campaign manager pulled together a memo to share with donors and supporters laying out our closing strategy. Please read it and, if you’re able, make a contribution to help us hit our goal. Thank you, Josh Hicks | | [**Donate **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20359834/256686956/-1276090683?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201015memo-nd_JH_all_nd_btn1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk0N2M3NC0yYTBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPfZ7pqF9mk5vJDBQnTqxWhQqdBTXnnaZzD4RtFGxIA=)
---
* * *
**From** : Brett Anders
**To** : Team Hicks supporters
**CC** : Interested parties
**RE** : 19 Days To Go
**Fundraising through Q3 2020**
When Josh and I first sat down to talk about building his campaign for Congress, we agreed that this race was going to be all about Kentuckians. Not Josh, not Andy Barr — but about real people who deserve real solutions from their leaders in Washington.
An important piece of that plan? Building our fundraising strategy around an army of grassroots supporters, not corporate donors and special interests. Together, we built an impressive grassroots fundraising machine made up of more than 15,000 donors — including nurses, teachers, and farmers — that closed the fundraising gap between Josh and his opponent in Q3 of this year:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20359835/256686957/-1276090683?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201015memo_JH_all_nd_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk0N2M3NC0yYTBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPfZ7pqF9mk5vJDBQnTqxWhQqdBTXnnaZzD4RtFGxIA=)
---
Most importantly, our grassroots donors allowed us to define who Josh was early in the race — long before the attacks came (more on that below).
We were able to get biographical ads — all about Josh in his own words — on the air a week before Andy Barr was able to respond. Our supporters’ contributions have kept us competitive on the air and in other mediums as well — mail, digital, and volunteer efforts.
**TV ad spend week over week**
As we head into the final stretch of the campaign, we’ve cut every single non-essential expenditure, we’re crunching the numbers each and every day, and monitoring our cash flow closely to ensure we get the most we possibly can from the money we raise.
Our most costly expenditure of the entire campaign is our television advertising. Each week, we wire money to cover the costs of our television advertising — and next Tuesday, we make our largest ad buy yet.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/20359836/256686958/-1276090683?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201015memo_JH_all_nd_img2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZDk0N2M3NC0yYTBmLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zPfZ7pqF9mk5vJDBQnTqxWhQqdBTXnnaZzD4RtFGxIA=)
---
**Our finance team and I have found a critical budget gap of $51,908, and we need to raise that by Monday at midnight, when we make our next (and largest) purchase of the campaign.**
**How supporters can help**
We’ve remained competitive throughout this campaign thanks to the incredible grassroots support behind Josh.
In the final stretch of this campaign, we know we have the strategy to win, but we need all hands on deck to ensure we can execute our plans and defend against Andy Barr’s incessant, misleading attacks.
**I’m putting out a call to our supporters to help us make up our fundraising gap. To make our next wire, we need to raise $51,908 before Monday, October 19 at midnight.**
**Make your first contribution now.** Our average online donation is just $36.

name: Nancy Mace
subject: we don’t need another political sham, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
The Supreme Court is one of our most revered institutions and it should be treated with respect and reverence — not used as a political football... [ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=0ccf7e4fb9fa4ef6a4f11ce5c6908a04&_e=HKfNKiDXCOek-AVT9cZFVLJKpBfpIaXBeqLEZlpRcRlrwNPWR4i3mNhW8WRHdu4R6hhjnaZn_e9BVfPq5QJ3BIDrgWuOXE8b0gcYGmXvtACvnPlLhzpmu5MpFbggD-EC6fvnS4WiixF5RVrOTKoI9plBDkiQun3xOlaiXruyK9WclTHYb7EXgVqkgcOPQY5gfLlI8pArxfTVWKS67w3kFH9LzmpHOVlYdIjw5KktSF_ioP5YN6UdVSglWCyeQW_D6pCCn8I7aJLtEkA9E6trydivFiyAYDhVm5ogUfFTeRwawXX84gEVI_Hzywh65GD-l5uDCONK1c9uwZ7P6qht2owKlslcnfBgsxz4bZALkCOja8V0Zt_54skOWN1MgtqJ38Cb0TGYM_2sU2809GU7mnimvGo9KzBbNRbz02GXUq_Ar1l4_9yuCy_5qOoXHA5FA6dNnpd2u4rnBWpKe7q558mWifo7q_ihltlMoG684I4%3D) Friend, _Have you been watching the Supreme Court nomination hearings? _
Judge Amy Coney Barrett is a brilliant legal mind, a hard-working mom, and a supremely talented, originalist judge who will make an excellent addition to the Supreme Court.
But that hasn’t stopped the Democrats from using her nomination to play political games. We don’t need another Kavanaugh hearing — the politicization of that process was traumatic and shameful for our entire country.
The Supreme Court is one of our most revered institutions and it should be treated with respect and reverence — not used as a political football. The hearings for well-qualified nominees like Judge Barrett should be sober, thorough, and respectful.
They are an opportunity for the Senate to exercise their Constitutional duty of advise and consent — not a chance to sling mud at political opponents or get a sound bite for cable news.
Unfortunately, the Democrats have already made it clear that they will stop at nothing to block Judge Barrett’s nomination. They have refused to meet with her, launched unfounded and ridiculous attacks, and threatened to pack the Supreme Court and destroy the filibuster if she is confirmed.
This is unacceptable, and frankly outrageous. It’s the continuation of the Kavanaugh strategy — obstruct the nominee at all costs, and if possible, destroy them.
**[Well, I’ve had enough, friend. That’s why I’m reaching out right now — I want you to stand with and tell the Senate: I support confirming Amy Coney Barrett.](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=0ccf7e4fb9fa4ef6a4f11ce5c6908a04&_e=HKfNKiDXCOek-AVT9cZFVLJKpBfpIaXBeqLEZlpRcRlrwNPWR4i3mNhW8WRHdu4R6hhjnaZn_e9BVfPq5QJ3BIDrgWuOXE8b0gcYGmXvtACvnPlLhzpmu5MpFbggD-EC6fvnS4WiixF5RVrOTKoI9plBDkiQun3xOlaiXruyK9WclTHYb7EXgVqkgcOPQY5gfLlI8pArxfTVWKS67w3kFH9LzmpHOVlYdIjw5KktSF_ioP5YN6UdVSglWCyeQW_D6pCCn8I7aJLtEkA9E6tryRyraV_OdxPQcg6g-9Mcxq5RqwDYQ_WMjD5qy0yJXMf2eZspPnHaP-Qo3coKAzjMQbuXk37Egn81QgtwYZkcCK2eEUpFcR1OnvPYNfDC_lXYFWxfetLkcAPHGVcpwJSNgdxZF6-H-JlFdZWorc3YKDIJFWMZDygkhfATqbFTfDlX766ozGKk7p97-mjBHk0jrZx_Rrhy-LbtLo0Hsf02np0%3D)**
_Add your name to show the Senate just how many Americans support Amy Coney Barrett's confirmation._ [**Tell the Senate: I support Amy Coney Barrett**](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=0ccf7e4fb9fa4ef6a4f11ce5c6908a04&_e=HKfNKiDXCOek-AVT9cZFVLJKpBfpIaXBeqLEZlpRcRlrwNPWR4i3mNhW8WRHdu4R6hhjnaZn_e9BVfPq5QJ3BIDrgWuOXE8b0gcYGmXvtACvnPlLhzpmu5MpFbggD-EC6fvnS4WiixF5RVrOTKoI9plBDkiQun3xOlaiXruyK9WclTHYb7EXgVqkgcOPQY5gfLlI8pArxfTVWKS67w3kFH9LzmpHOVlYdIjw5KktSF_ioP5YN6UdVSglWCyeQW_D6pCCn8I7aJLtEkA9E6tryXzLiTNvI9WVQzHphHBJ2k-cPW0YI15PFmiMR3XAE8frzm43itaDCfOb3hxgEprVgUli2T5IWQmUBl8Sis8mkt9xG9EsPT5IHECU3Oy6F5O1upkWPsiGsDaqm9rAYmqjwT8T4kMqivkQfGmYvnaR1PwumIfBIUwWhJbVRHMExZBfmHtF9NU_ByXddKL0z852R5NkYMBGJxOy1zJYXVX32Uo%3D) Thank you for reading,
Nancy Mace |

name: Judicial Watch News Release Alert
subject: Judicial Watch Joins The ObamaGate Movie as Executive Producers
body:
Judicial Watch announced today that it is partnering with the Unreported Story Society (Ann McElhinney and Phelim McAleer) as executive producers of The ObamaGate Movie, the new film starring Dean Cain (Superman) and Kristy Swanson (Buffy the Vampire Slayer), which is set to premiere on YouTube on October 20 at 9 pm ET and tells the story of the hoax that was the Trump/Russia investigation.
| | |
---
---
|
---
| Dear Judicial Watch Supporter,

You may have seen the latest news from Judicial Watch on social media but I wanted to be sure you received our press release that was just sent to members of the media moments ago. We are pleased with Judicial Watch's opportunity to further educate the public about the Obamagate scandal by utilizating the power of film. This exciting partnership reaffirms Judicial Watch's ongoing fight against government corruption and abuse. Thank you for standing with us.

Sincerely,
Amelia Koehn
Public Affairs Coordinator
---
---
|
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
Contact: 202-646-5188
October 15, 2020
* * *
---
|
---
| **Judicial Watch Joins _The ObamaGate Movie_ as Executive Producers**
**(Washington, DC)** – Judicial Watch announced today that it is partnering with the Unreported Story Society (Ann McElhinney and Phelim McAleer) as executive producers of _ The ObamaGate Movie_, the new film starring [Dean Cain](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20846&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW1kYi5jb20vbmFtZS9ubTAwMDEwMDIvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==) (_Superman_) and [Kristy Swanson](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20847&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW1kYi5jb20vbmFtZS9ubTAwMDE3ODUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==) (_Buffy the Vampire Slayer_), which is set to premiere on YouTube on October 20 at 9 pm ET and tells the story of the hoax that was the Trump/Russia investigation.

According to the filmmakers, _ObamaGate_ “exposes the Deep State plot to undermine the Trump candidacy and presidency” and it reveals the lies behind the fake Russia collusion narrative. _The ObamaGate Movie_ is a verbatim play that was filmed “Hamilton style” in Los Angeles on the Comedy Central stage at the Hudson Theater.

Judicial Watch is an educational foundation located in Washington, D.C. and is known for their investigative work that has brought to light some of the most critical aspects of the “Russia hoax” investigation and the ongoing corruption at the DOJ and the FBI. They have been particularly active in using Freedom of Information laws to uncover documents exposing the extent of the Deep State plot against the president.

Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said he was excited to see some of the government records uncovered by Judicial Watch turned into a film. “Judicial Watch has been working for years to expose the rampant corruption that has plagued the DOJ and the FBI,” said Fitton. “It’s exciting to see these discoveries turned into an entertaining and educational film that is easy to watch and understand – so even more Americans can see the despicable and deceptive ObamaGate plot to undermine President Trump and our Republic.”

Phelim McAleer, co-writer of _ObamaGate_ , praised Judicial Watch for their work exposing government corruption. “Without Judicial Watch, the American people would still be largely in the dark about the ObamaGate abuse of President Trump and other innocent Americans,” said McAleer. “Since the film is entirely verbatim, it’s based off much of the investigative work uncovered by Judicial Watch and other investigators. We are so excited to work with Judicial Watch and help as many people as possible learn about this critical story.”

_ObamaGate_ is a verbatim play that examines the truth behind the “Russia collusion” hoax. The film’s dialogue is taken word-for-word from text messages, emails, and testimony of the key figures behind the hoaxes. Dean Cain (_Lois & Clark, Gosnell_) and Kristy Swanson (_Buffy the Vampire Slayer, Psych_) reprise their roles in ObamaGate as lovers Peter Strzok and Lisa Page. The Strzok-Page texts have revealed the depth of the plot against the president. Cain and Swanson are joined by [John James ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20848&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW1kYi5jb20vbmFtZS9ubTA0MTY2MjUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==)(_Dynasty_), who plays former FBI Director James Comey.

The movie is being released following several books and movies portraying the FBI and DOJ operatives as heroic. Showtime has released the big budget, pro-Comey mini-series called “[ _The Comey Rule_](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20857&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9kZWFkbGluZS5jb20vMjAyMC8wOS90aGUtY29tZXktcnVsZS1yYXRpbmdzLXNob3d0aW1lLWphbWVzLWNvbWV5LWRvbmFsZC10cnVtcC0xMjM0NTg4NzcwLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1lbWJlcitOZXdzK0FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMTUxNzMyMzA=)” and FBI lovebird Peter Strzok published his self-aggrandizing memoir, which has been accompanied by mostly softball media interviews and reviews from the mainstream media.

The _ObamaGate_ film will be directed by veteran director [Kiff Scholl](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20850&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW1kYi5jb20vbmFtZS9ubTA3NzQ1OTgvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==). The film is co-written by [Phelim McAleer](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20851&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW1kYi5jb20vbmFtZS9ubTI2OTc1NjcvP3JlZl89bnZfc3Jfc3JzZ18wJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==) and [Brian Godawa](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20852&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW1kYi5jb20vbmFtZS9ubTAzMjM3MjUvP3JlZl89bnZfc3Jfc3JzZ18wJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==). Godawa is a veteran screenwriter with credits including “ _To End All Wars_ ” starring Keifer Sutherland.

The film was created through crowdfunding and so far the campaign has raised over $150,000 to make the film. More information and the crowdfunding campaign can be accessed at [ObamagateMovie.com](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20853&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly9vYmFtYWdhdGV0aGVtb3ZpZS5jb20vP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==).

The trailer for _The ObamaGate Movie_ is [available](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20854&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly95b3V0dS5iZS9GdEdHa1pUVDlkbz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1lbWJlcitOZXdzK0FsZXJ0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDEwMTUxNzMyMzA=) on YouTube now [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=FtGGkZTT9do&feature;=youtu.be](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51733&L=20856&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1GdEdHa1pUVDlkbyZmZWF0dXJlPXlvdXR1LmJlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWVtYmVyK05ld3MrQWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTAxNTE3MzIzMA==)

Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said he was excited to see some of the government records uncovered by Judicial Watch turned into a film. “Judicial Watch has been working for years to expose the rampant corruption that has plagued the DOJ and the FBI,” said Fitton. “It’s exciting to see these discoveries turned into an entertaining and educational film that is easy to watch and understand – so even more Americans can see the despicable and deceptive ObamaGate plot to undermine President Trump and our Republic.” Phelim McAleer, co-writer of ObamaGate , praised Judicial Watch for their work exposing government corruption. “Without Judicial Watch, the American people would still be largely in the dark about the ObamaGate abuse of President Trump and other innocent Americans,” said McAleer. “Since the film is entirely verbatim, it’s based off much of the investigative work uncovered by Judicial Watch and other investigators. We are so excited to work with Judicial Watch and help as many people as possible learn about this critical story.” ObamaGate is a verbatim play that examines the truth behind the “Russia collusion” hoax. The film’s dialogue is taken word-for-word from text messages, emails, and testimony of the key figures behind the hoaxes. Dean Cain (Lois & Clark, Gosnell) and Kristy Swanson (Buffy the Vampire Slayer, Psych) reprise their roles in ObamaGate as lovers Peter Strzok and Lisa Page. The Strzok-Page texts have revealed the depth of the plot against the president. Cain and Swanson are joined by ), who plays former FBI Director James Comey. The movie is being released following several books and movies portraying the FBI and DOJ operatives as heroic. Showtime has released the big budget, pro-Comey mini-series called “=” and FBI lovebird Peter Strzok published his self-aggrandizing memoir, which has been accompanied by mostly softball media interviews and reviews from the mainstream media. The ObamaGate film will be directed by veteran director ==. The film is co-written by == and ==. Godawa is a veteran screenwriter with credits including “ To End All Wars ” starring Keifer Sutherland. The film was created through crowdfunding and so far the campaign has raised over $150,000 to make the film. More information and the crowdfunding campaign can be accessed at ==. The trailer for The ObamaGate Movie is = on YouTube now == | | | | | == | | == | | == | | = ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C) 2017 - 2020, All Rights Reserved == | | | =

subject: Trump on the Right Side of History in Confronting Latin America’s Dictators
body:
The brutal regimes in Venezuela, Cuba and Nicaragua pose a grave threat to our country’s national security interests. We must continue to consistently | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f8172a815e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump on the Right Side of History in Confronting Latin America’s Dictators**

“The brutal regimes in Venezuela, Cuba and Nicaragua pose a grave threat to our country’s national security interests. We must continue to consistently deny funds to these regimes, which work together to oppress their people, wreak havoc in our hemisphere and oppose U.S. interests,” Rep. Mario Díaz-Balart (R-FL) writes in the _Miami Herald_.

“The Trump administration has responded effectively to this reality, marginalizing these intertwined dictatorships while supporting humanitarian and pro-democracy efforts for the populations they oppress.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dcf1ec149f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Politics has become such vicious blood sport that [Judge Amy Coney] Barrett said her family had discussed whether she should accept Trump’s nomination. ‘We knew our lives would be combed over for any negative details,’ she said . . . America is beyond lucky that such extraordinary people still answer the call to public service,” Michael Goodwin writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6b927b9e9c&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “This year corporations and activists have been waging a media and boycott campaign against [Facebook] to demand it censor more content.” Yesterday, “Facebook joined Twitter in suppressing links to a _New York Post_ story . . . The better response would be let the story’s facts and sources be debated, rather than suppress it,” [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17e7c48582&e=3ee4985eea) editorial board writes.
---
|
---
| The United States is investing over $480 million for a new Coronavirus test that produces results in about 20 minutes—without needing to be processed at a lab, Will Feuer reports. “The test is already in use by a number of clients, including the National Basketball Association, which successfully played out its season.” Read more in [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2f2e2cfb5&e=3ee4985eea).

**🎬** [**WATCH: President Trump is slashing red tape to save lives!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c44113974a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Florida is no chicken
body:
Career politicians are chickens
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001NJsFT4X7sZjIpsELOiyW_wbJpQctbyyccKRsY8h-BLmHKwQsE_shUvy_SZgOHQQNoAKbnikJXB3H5pjVVFNqZ6ajhwKvL_BaWTF5XTLOjrSvSq4YNL126FMg2GPe4aPU1AwR7yJx6qDaci7juK5J5YjcaehAWQ5wHfYKdarpyxU=&c=zlvf8ndbz1n8arecccqQuB5hbzO9-zrI4qFDT20fFV_YBPq8-lah9w==&ch=TXKLf-SG6vzWqPP6kEMCDA-0zc1EsYGWjiW4J9798341OP7Ws716wQ==)
---
| Patriot,
If there is something I have learned from my years working to drain the swamp - it is that chickens and career politicians have a lot in common.
The truth is, they shy away from real issues because they don't have the guts to get the job done. They have a herd mentality, always following after the radical ideas from the liberal elite, like Nancy Pelosi, ignoring the devastation it could bring to our society.
In Florida, we are not chickens. We are tough, determined, and hard workers. The time of career politicians is over, the people want strong conservative leaders that will listen and act on behalf of their constituents, not chicken out when things get hard.
---

subject: Match alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Common Good
body:
| | | Derek, Tonight at midnight we close the books on the final public fundraising deadline of this election. It’s the last opportunity we’ll have to showcase the strength of our grassroots support -- so we need to make this one count. More importantly, it’s one of our last opportunities to make an impact before this election is over. Voters are already casting their ballots in Virginia and we don’t have much time left. That’s why I’m so excited to tell you about today’s matching opportunity. A group of generous donors has stepped up to match every dollar that comes in between now and midnight. ******[Will you rush a contribution before midnight and have your donation doubled?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkRkHmtLQQI5iSwMyf3fB4Ym9kOp0s_NOgE0scgaIyCc2y1OpIicIZGRGE6PN8sNPFyGrUT2sy0RgMowZEberErlLHLlR_4B_P-npLUp1KQxM0hWCZXBFpHApWw3OOAK98f2dluYxGUrpRLZ3t3JDu4F3--dYaq5OIRJFAa2uaUsgc8LI4Qc9ndQpF5gkFIi1fubLvF9HdOI_zwVreUuM2Tdty4XdAmY3nRxzakBtOGie6H4f0Z6q4aJWGMmXVD7awwLO5CdOA77FDuK01Ll2ojQ/361/1wQeyyW_RkqR_v6pehVlnw/h0/_KXV_Vj610iqnPIOju72w6cUcMJVycuDS6odus9uHcg)** | | [**$5 »**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yaiecqqhJ1Shz_U6-fHTTkRkHmtLQQI5iSwMyf3fB4Yk4sarnDW_JxxoGCD8oVGosIZXXia6QxLY2rX_jbePSKDQxirKaNXMgDAwZrTFfa9JKsGVRJ0sj2FExXgC5za6eco42dl6n0u1wuGmMTeMwQeMvqogIZxXCAsfjUO2wb47Nq3n-0b5Zp6XL0cK0GV7bVNO6Rf1GptFRwjYn1eW6No6KHh5Gc_d5_NtNO1kDHRk_KEnsYeZdsR257sAq1WNwq9aQaAgQP-onuuVi1dEyKU1JzxKDHnkZbXXLy0F2M2hYcvGMj79thjR2hs1JW58w/361/1wQeyyW_RkqR_v6pehVlnw/h1/quN4fc4MrWD5VcLQWu1OjUYWKQKnxlDj4JiyigHJFeo)

When opportunities like this come around, we have to make the most of them. This election is too important to leave anything on the table.
The rest of the country will be watching what happens here in Virginia. Let’s make sure we do our part.

clean_body: | | | Derek, Tonight at midnight we close the books on the final public fundraising deadline of this election. It’s the last opportunity we’ll have to showcase the strength of our grassroots support -- so we need to make this one count. More importantly, it’s one of our last opportunities to make an impact before this election is over. Voters are already casting their ballots in Virginia and we don’t have much time left. That’s why I’m so excited to tell you about today’s matching opportunity. A group of generous donors has stepped up to match every dollar that comes in between now and midnight. **** | | | | | When opportunities like this come around, we have to make the most of them. This election is too important to leave anything on the table. The rest of the country will be watching what happens here in Virginia. Let’s make sure we do our part. Thanks, Terry Paid for by Virginians for Common Good | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Terry McAuliffe, please .

body:

| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011Y50luK6v_l6K0r0Bv5W48Fnb928006lVYOwDqg81XWppj-HoJdFs8mZ76Vq8YKbnfq0_PpjJYXV3D7nYFXo3XYWhi0PnEwPZrW7dkNvaVYZY4C1tkFyOYsxLj2VAHyL0p9EESXmZVKRdi8QtU4jmbeGmV9wu3wT1DHgxxX8J5Q=&c=Ha6XD6775d9giPsPfaIbSzd5YnRyOKQh1c6hbHsxiJH2GzIVfX0diQ==&ch=Onc8R0lmyFeAgYnnchV3Vjk-Tr_gB_QPc25aNQZMHdxiqTqfYPbWiA==)

| Patriot,
Let's cut to the chase. Joe Biden will be a disaster for our country, in part because he has been one of the weakest politicians against China. Just look at his record. In his over 40 YEARS in public office, Joe Biden has:
✅ Supported trade deals that took away millions of American jobs.
✅ Gave China the most-favored-nation status that lets them get the best trade terms given by its trading partner. ✅ Let China walk all over us.

name: Josh Hawley
subject: What we've seen thus far
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
The Supreme Court hearings have begun. This week, Amy Coney Barrett sat before Senators on both sides of the aisle during confirmation hearings. Dear Peter, The Supreme Court hearings have begun. This week, Amy Coney Barrett sat before Senators on both sides of the aisle during confirmation hearings. While Joe Biden and Kamala Harris say the voters don’t deserve to know whether or not they will pack the court if elected, _**liberal Senators have said that Amy Coney Barrett is too Catholic to be on the Court!**_ As I said in this week's hearing, this argument is an attempt to bring back an old standard that the Constitution forbids in Article 6, which is _a religious test._ Earlier this week, I joined Fox News' Tucker Carlson to discuss the importance of defending religious liberty. _**If you missed it, check it out by clicking on the image below.**_ [ ](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=bb56db28a67d4352a2ab853d3a1b9b65&_e=Cb91dunfDj09u_koTsWyPi3JayTqzsTRy0i66sgJlS3iif1VetcgNGDDdgamSdopJOFHYZGZ6uMxJ_EUg-fgbJx3b0O83h4Cjdd3LHeG1A6ZUwfwx3_FKdi8pG7yg7xLTOicsHkasxtPHYfnaNlnmep_2T7kB7xsEnJoyiZH_T7EkIKGJfwiDgEXub7w_cJJga-Zqsx02iomezRwK4zQMaUOFi810pC8pQStn4pGGld7vHj-x7zI4Vm0XzqvX4shnAITunXpi0BBGEz6IUpg0-j8A4XHNd3EYgbuRjeEfdKYEsaWFt764ogO29lxpR5Qh9iPdnSbWBDYkH7V7o1JJuAzQdK4tfRnZ8F7HY4-v9aADM9oXvwiGzan3CRXPS2enUeSqzVii4KvsHfHr3eAuZLuJwUH9W-pHgVMLztZpng%3D) | |
---
When you tell somebody they're too Catholic to be on the bench, when you tell them they're going to be a Catholic judge – not an American judge – that's bigotry, plain and simple.

_**It’s time we hold Democrats accountable for their hypocrisy!**_

clean_body: The Supreme Court hearings have begun. This week, Amy Coney Barrett sat before Senators on both sides of the aisle during confirmation hearings. Dear Peter, The Supreme Court hearings have begun. This week, Amy Coney Barrett sat before Senators on both sides of the aisle during confirmation hearings. While Joe Biden and Kamala Harris say the voters don’t deserve to know whether or not they will pack the court if elected, liberal Senators have said that Amy Coney Barrett is too Catholic to be on the Court! As I said in this week's hearing, this argument is an attempt to bring back an old standard that the Constitution forbids in Article 6, which is a religious test. Earlier this week, I joined Fox News' Tucker Carlson to discuss the importance of defending religious liberty. If you missed it, check it out by clicking on the image below. | | When you tell somebody they're too Catholic to be on the bench, when you tell them they're going to be a Catholic judge – not an American judge – that's bigotry, plain and simple. It’s time we hold Democrats accountable for their hypocrisy! Amy Coney Barrett is a pro-Constitution conservative with an outstanding record. That’s what we deserve in a Supreme Court justice, and both she and the American people deserve better than what we’ve seen coming from the Left. I urge all of my Democrat colleagues to publicly reject attacks on her faith and abstain from anti-Catholic rhetoric. President Trump made a strong pick, and I look forward to her being on the Supreme Court of the United States. Sincerely, Josh Hawley | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate

clean_body: I’ve always told you the truth, and I’m not about to stop now I've always told you the truth, and I'm not about to stop now. | Peter, By now you've heard that my liberal opponent raised more money in the last three months than any other U.S. Senate candidate in the history of our nation. The record-shattering $57 million Jaime Harrison received in the 3rd Quarter puts him on pace to top the $100 million fundraising mark sometime this week. Here's what Harrison won't dare tell his liberal donors - and what I need to share with you: Money won't win this race, but a lack of money could lose it. More than 2 million contributions from liberals all across the nation have allowed Harrison to saturate the airwaves here in South Carolina. You can't turn on the TV or radio without hearing another one of his attack ads. I don't need to match him dollar-for-dollar to win, but I do need to raise an additional $100,000 today to set the record straight. | | | | | | | You've always responded when I needed you the most. This is one of those times, Please don't close this email with the best of intentions to come back to it later. Thank you, Lindsey Graham | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid For By Team Graham, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails?

| Trail Update
---
| Friends, I am beyond proud of my team. Last week they passed the major milestone of calling over 250,000 people in the District. If you want to be a part of this historic team, please email [condrad@katforcongress.com](mailto:conrad@katforcongress.com).
This past week, I had the privilege to attend events all over the District. I was welcomed by the Putnam County Republican Club on Tuesday night. It was a fired up crowd that is ready to re-elect President Trump and elect me to Congress. I also had the opportunity to knock doors this Saturday in Clay county. The results from that day of knocking doors was astounding.

People are voting, and enthusiasm is high! We are less than 12 hours away from our third quarter FEC reporting deadline. We know when Jackie’s report becomes public, it will show that she is funded by outside corporate PAC money.

Every dollar we raise helps us get more voters to the polls. We’re going to flip IN02 blue. We’re going to send Jackie home. And we’re going to bring the voice of the people in this district back to Washington.

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: We need him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ846P5V0cLd-LcpPe8zJVBp2XfxXUsT19DCksRwDfCCH1-GVHMqdfqAuzry8GhXUs8mAkgsb6pCBc5g721HPoHkFrNLxY4Iav11ES9wufNw58vwMw8CI1lAMaAbK0UimFP3C3gwcYvvM8xuTqrVxPbbkITUJhyfiXO3E7mRvLoZpYYdO6EnK0WxfYJjKmcI0KBJP4Tzjdkys2HzuZyRyWbwoQ%3D%3D)
---
Hey Peter,

I’m going to cut right to the chase.

We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. **[Can you step up and donate before midnight to help us fight off the Left?](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ84N6vA8I-shUdpRu1FBFhN9ODllHDdekSSdDwQUb7UIp4GY87kgEYPGMEpaPgNbgZim1_37o-1WIrQHIpSQMLvDJaKr0RaYhF1b4HJOZrfUan_EyuHG2SURkWBIv0bUqfv49zGYwfN2POoKw-pprZ3IYTCbMg7MKHGeHsyJb3qSHriUEyAifWlHi3oDsvz9Es4FyEKhoYtoT72vstaVGBdiA%3D%3D)**

President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana.

It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. **[We need your help to hold the U.S. Senate majority.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ84KNsiqogrGRwAVT9tOTOgo-bWFzemZn5Bp6YD8w3lSSeByGWzIb2agahVHx-w7ReZxmZRrB4FfYvbKvIQOo3hTxkKVtFHbo-a9iv53u3E9fJ-O7YEs77wv_IUZ7T8i5aHXp2QTxh-giCgF9Fp2_LG-OHALxw5JUdsNRFVzfhDU1AMBYUYTZ-AGX3q-uKNOadQ7s9SmntiycSflYL7wpAuBQ%3D%3D)**

| [**HELP US PROTECT THE SENATE MAJORITY ->**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ84xCJ5BpXTLSwUPOEL7Ahdmltb6foq8kWSFbpA273yYUArJYMyiHlKkBLUbv-e2QwLkwr-UB4P3xm7LO4olWGbaVx5gCG-arw3awNjarvFgqrzzl2ndVSaB1JWI_MQGa3wcThBBu0u_MPxchcPOu4nMsw8vjPvkJLOFCiM8G2nAl5Pg26JQtMy5tVGAxQJTL9mB4y32ekVJ9gV6ofcikX-Cg%3D%3D)
---

Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents.

The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help.

**[Please, do anything you can right now to support both of our critical re-elections. Without Steve, the Republican Senate majority is lost.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ84dtXqYm0Hzb9J4NQXMi8q7-jNhBF4goToKpLs7soCJw5kCx6THEQ6SCnqR7XO4qWQveUSdnOIvG8J51tjKsuKhQOxn32W8dNa4ha4tteEWgh8OxEYVjCxGL2BwIkksIpaUU6rnTpVsm0OBjg79TVQv0ZNGdJEa9rXxJjG2NHlAT-8r8nBZFZQQDEq5h-BGCQu1RkPvg6U6hAnNkwX9DpRmw%3D%3D)**

[**STAND WITH STEVE DAINES AND LINDSEY GRAHAM ->**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ84X7lo4NXr2g19QzOIHYA81X8xzMxyT-5hEQ-f1wWg3gvDN3OHepgF5_UbH9Y1KZfXTl-tEwxUTF637rOpWEPchZmQNwxdvHq-0urmSAbRfwsoLhtMwFXbR0_5A7u5C7WXlG4kTSSjn-FiVCSMNk_Fu23d92jA3sKNtbmqpyAsKB5nP6ZX0A21hYS2vrCZcmeloI-QXhVgOKHwKM7O88dmqw%3D%3D)
---

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. **[The donation you make today will be split to help Steve Daines in Montana and my campaign in South Carolina.](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ845uQacAjBOhNIUVkO4LDRpg74z9HNUf3EiPBJsPKzSsAAnN48JjS_Hm5YuJn2BFmvrrZogQHrnst0O6y8lsNI61u78UTHHQHY_DICWXGg1rTQqm9fTu4YhopRiIRgHDeomaLgsxP4_3mf2cDKC0tGXou0vVu_4sY5P47ITHbkSgzNJnQ6EXwfHcasdWcTh6emsdbS5G_QVnDsAZwwL6oRCg%3D%3D)** Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help.

_Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.[Chip in $10 or more to help Steve today!](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=1db999b8eee44cc6a6d030b56e913ce4&_e=3LWxxFLK4miAXffWuPLJ9kFcGj8Jj2ddb-KoyqS0V-aOFtvXTBcdjk8jPOmKWRVd0S8HWjL9GXx59zlUTz0R30wuwcFXaJl7ipK64sFrUU_ruwX9nexHFzNhkubARRz0dfn1Q_PavkNGbiIT5u5m5axIHlW66lzOGV0H-QF1BE3EhxHGUgWFC3Q-LLOScZ843y-9ZupPsL0KDpm4IaYzflTcE58AvCEbdgZszMpc7GuSgVbFcHpWNk-ARcGbr5d-gNSWZZPHyQvLxaseAq-PYtz1yno89sWDnFU2Z5EX1HB5yWb41oDibHpbXeY5oWYK-a3VNIeONUs6nCwUCOJQ4yqZn58Nhqez1hnpGANWfVzoS0tBopSWsxgrtKp6vgGi-T-V10AKrYDx4YJlIo6M_g%3D%3D)

clean_body: The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. | Hey Peter, I’m going to cut right to the chase. We’re 55 donations short of my goal to help protect the Republican Senate majority. President Obama and Chuck Schumer are raising and spending tens of millions of dollars to flip the Senate this cycle, and one of their top targets is my good friend Senator Steve Daines from Montana. It’s vital we do everything we can from now until Election Day to help conservatives like Steve. | Obama and Schumer know they only need to flip four seats to win the majority. Normally I wouldn’t be too concerned, but Steve and I have been consistently outraised this year by our liberal Democrat opponents. The Left’s plan of targeting red states is working, and we need your help. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. Both of our races are critical to keeping our GOP Senate majority, so thank you for stepping up to help. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails?

Friend,
---
I wanted to share my latest campaign ad with you.
---
**_It’s about my mom._**
---
Growing up, my mother was the strongest person I knew.
---
She was at home while her 3 children were deployed to combat zones, and her faith and courage gave me the strength I needed to complete my mission and return home.
---
_Her strength has inspired me to start a new mission, one of service before self, and country before politics. Now I want every voter in TX-07 to hear that story._
---

clean_body: It’s about my mom. | Friend, I wanted to share my latest campaign ad with you. It’s about my mom. Growing up, my mother was the strongest person I knew. She was at home while her 3 children were deployed to combat zones, and her faith and courage gave me the strength I needed to complete my mission and return home. Her strength has inspired me to start a new mission, one of service before self, and country before politics. Now I want every voter in TX-07 to hear that story. When I fought for America, I fought for unity and peace. The destruction that has run rampant in the streets of our great cities these last few months absolutely breaks my heart -- this is not America. America is the land of the free, and the home of the brave. It is where dreams come true and anything is possible. We must reclaim the American Dream in this country: one of goodness, prosperity, and respect for one another. That’s why I’ve set forth on a new mission, and that’s why I’m asking you to help get my message on the air. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Rita Hart
subject: About to get on the stage for my third debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | Peter, the third debate between my opponent and me will start shortly. I'm taking just a few minutes before I head out on stage to check in with you and ask for some help. Before the debate ends, help me get as many donations as possible so we can reach out to voters in the district to show them just how different we are and what our values are. **[Will you chip in $10 right now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZBgySajcpTMF7pn5DAdzQA2o745mabhWSeqI44CkwN0=/nx1fbI3l-Ck-7qZ56ER14VSjuHEYjfBVCzr_dEgKaAw=?refcode=201015-email)** This race is still so close, and with so much on the line from our health care to our children's education, I need all of you behind me so we can reach every single undecided voter in the district. With one final push, we can deliver real leadership for the people of Iowa's 2nd district and fight the D.C. corruption that's trying to sway this election for insider interests! Please donate here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2010-q4-rh](https://act.myngp.com/el/ZBgySajcpTMF7pn5DAdzQA2o745mabhWSeqI44CkwN0=/nx1fbI3l-Ck-7qZ56ER14VSjuHEYjfBVCzr_dEgKaAw=?refcode=201015-email)** Yours,
Rita Hart
