name: Tim Kaine
subject: We're down to the wire.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f636/2089442459/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
Derek,

We all know that Virginia is in good hands with Mark Warner as our senior Senator.

I've had the opportunity to know and work with Mark for the better part of 30 years, and I can tell you that his leadership, honesty, and commitment to fighting for what's best for _every_ Virginian make it an honor to serve alongside him.

**This has been a tough year for all of us. I know that, and Mark knows that. And this election looks a lot different than any other in my lifetime.[It's also the most important of our lifetimes, which is why I'm asking you to dig deep today. Will you pitch in whatever you can to keep Mark in the Senate and elect Democrats all the way down the ticket?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f635/2089442459/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

We're coming down to the home stretch in this election. With less than 30 days until Election Day on November 3rd, and millions of votes already cast in states across the country, now is the time to keep pushing. And I'll tell you what: _We cannot take a single vote for granted._ I remember the election in 2014, as I'm sure many of you do -- polls told us Mark had a comfortable lead, and he ended up narrowly winning by less than 17,000 votes.

**I don 't want to lose my friend Mark in the Senate. If you have the means to make a contribution to support Mark and Democrats across Virginia, I'd really appreciate it.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
**[DONATE $5](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f634/2089442459/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?express_lane=true&refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=express_lane_1&amount=5")**
**[DONATE $10](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f633/2089442459/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?express_lane=true&refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=express_lane_2&amount=10")**
**[DONATE $25](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f632/2089442459/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?express_lane=true&refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=express_lane_3&amount=25")**
**[DONATE $50](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f631/2089442459/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?express_lane=true&refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=express_lane_4&amount=50")**
**[DONATE $100](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f630/2089442459/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?express_lane=true&refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=express_lane_5&amount=100")**
**[CHOOSE AN AMOUNT](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f63f/2089442459/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=express_lane_other")**
What I've always admired about my friend Mark is his willingness to roll up his sleeves and work until the job is done. Whether it's working for years to pass sweeping legislation to protect our national parks and fully fund the Land and Water Conservation Fund, fighting to lower the cost of prescription drugs, or looking for innovative ways to create job opportunities in Virginia, his track record shows that he gets things done.

Early voting is well underway in Virginia, and I've already cast my vote for Mark. I'm ready to send him back to the Senate and keep this Commonwealth blue. I hope you'll consider doing the same so we can continue to work together toward a brighter future for Virginia.

Thank you, Derek.

-- Tim Kaine

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f63e/2089442459/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg3NCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-tkaine?refcode=20201015_f_1_nd__874__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da27/53d9897e/555b7ccb/1c88f63d/2089442459/VEsHBQ/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?David=20Oks?=
subject: What they didn't teach you...
body:
We're pleased to send you Matt Karp's video on what you didn't learn about the American Civil War. | |
---
| | |
# What they didn't teach you...

Hey ,

It's been a hectic two weeks of activity since we launched, but I'm happy to share that the Gravel Institute's third video (and last one of our initial batch of videos), Matt Karp's video on the radical face of the Civil War, has premiered. It's doing great (the best of all three so far!). Please take a moment to watch it below, and let me know what you think:
---
| [ ](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=3b4ce58b68&e=85f7472d66 "What They Didn't Teach You About the Civil War")
---
Matt Karp on what you didn't learn about the Civil War.
| We've seen incredible growth (we're on track to hit 100,000 subscribers soon), so the very best thing you could do for us would be joining on YouTube:
---
| [Join us on YouTube](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=5df2a5880c&e=85f7472d66 "Join us on YouTube")
---
| And if you want to help out, become a patron! Since we're loosened from the initial launch schedule, we'll be doing forums with patrons very soon so they can guide the strategy. Following a strategy guided by our supporters is the crucial thing; we'll spend the next week talking with patrons about how we can improve. So join if you can!
---
| [Become a patron!](https://gravelinstitute.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4840f01d672bb468321c6d3b8&id=3214706826&e=85f7472d66 "Become a patron!")
---
| And thanks again for your help with the project. We're really happy to see where it's gotten so soon.
---
| In Solidarity,
David Oks
**The Gravel Institute**

**BREAKING: MSU poll shows Governor Steve Bullock _leading_ Senator Steve Daines
Bullock 49% - Daines 47%**

name: House DFL Updates
subject: Local jobs and projects passes
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/8vNBa7ZEHnlVqYuNPjvMqA7LYIrWvDRvjTjG7_uVuEc=/x_vUs7PUOH7J8MF2XyxRYVdiiUQ_JjWdFURC0gNTdZQ=?refcode=101520)
| | Friend, We've got exciting news: on Wednesday night, the Minnesota House passed a long-awaited local jobs and projects bill after months of Republicans blocking progress -- creating new jobs, funding local infrastructure projects, and giving a much needed boost to Minnesota's economy. Without the leadership of DFLers in the State House, this robust bill that invests in a better future for all Minnesotans would not have been passed. **Will you make an investment in our campaign so that we can keep leading the way on important issues like local jobs and infrastructure?** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8vNBa7ZEHnlVqYuNPjvMqA7LYIrWvDRvjTjG7_uVuEc=/x_vUs7PUOH7J8MF2XyxRYVdiiUQ_JjWdFURC0gNTdZQ=?refcode=101520) Your donation will enable us to grow our House DFL Majority and ensure that we can keep fighting to protect each and every Minnesotan's livelihood. In addition to the long-overdue investments in infrastructure, House DFLers also passed funds to:
* Temporarily increase wages for personal care assistants.
* Ensure untested rape kits get tested to bring sexual predators to justice.
* Help Minnesotans with disabilities get access to the care they need.
* Prevent the closure of two corrections facilities at Togo and Willow River.

As we saw this special session, when we come together, we can accomplish big things. Thank you, House DFL Team **P.S. Minnesota residents can donate $50 (or $100 per couple) once per year and it will be refunded to you by the state.** [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/8vNBa7ZEHnlVqYuNPjvMqA7LYIrWvDRvjTjG7_uVuEc=/x_vUs7PUOH7J8MF2XyxRYVdiiUQ_JjWdFURC0gNTdZQ=?refcode=101520)

| Hi , With all of the questionable voting practices this year, this election could very well end up being decided by the Supreme Court. **But with just eight justices on the bench, there could be a tie!** We have to confirm Justice Amy Coney Barrett before the election to ensure that will not happen. [**Help me continue pushing to get ACB confirmed with a quick $30 donation to our campaign right now.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTMyNzMyNjI2Mjg3MjAzOTY1JmM9bDRrOSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzE3NDM4NzAmZD1jMGUyazZi.zAPrWITBVFmOqPlfAlqqRwASY1ug9gJyL_ZLZ_7Edps)

| Mitch McConnell promised to hold a vote before the November 3rd election. I am working hard to make sure that vote happens. **But a number of moderate Senators are lobbying behind the scenes to delay that vote!** I am urging Mitch to stand strong. I am doing my best to persuade all of my colleagues to do the right thing and vote for Amy Coney Barrett before the election. [**Send our campaign a one time donation of $45 or more right now to help me stop the vote from being delayed.**](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTMyNzMyNjI2Mjg3MjAzOTY1JmM9bDRrOSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzE3NDM4ODImZD1jMmM0bjhy.VkOeZtv3onKsv7d2otSBQb2QcwwAqScRGySupr4UvKQ)

If just one or two moderate Republicans fails to follow through, we could lose this confirmation battle. **I believe we can get the votes we need, but I need your support to keep fighting.** **[Your generous gift of $60, $85, $110 or more will go directly towards my efforts to keep the Senate in Republican hands.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0xNTMyNzMyNjI2Mjg3MjAzOTY1JmM9bDRrOSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MzE3NDM4OTEmZD1sOW82cDVz.hV07aqkyzPk9qZL1fKEnPn6fQsHo2DC_rR8RR6ag6-o)** Stand with me today, and we will secure another Supreme Court seat together.

Hey Peter,

We just finished running the numbers, and it's looking like Sen. Cornyn's special interests are bailing him out again, so he's starting to pull ahead. We can't afford to play catch-up so late in the campaign, so we need to do everything we can to stay ahead, and we need your help!

This campaign wouldn't be anywhere near where we are without your support, and we are relying on y'all to help us capitalize on our momentum and surge into a victory for MJ.

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e890/77d4c309/220eb9ec/2635ab7e/1340985777/VEsHDA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e890/77d4c309/220eb9ec/2635ab79/1340985777/VEsEBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e890/77d4c309/220eb9ec/2635ab78/1340985777/VEsEBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

7117 Farnam St, Ste. 2, Omaha, NE 68132
info@eastmanforcongress.com

subject: Helping small businesses
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

My opponent is out of touch with Texans. **Just like his progressive allies in Congress, Colin Allred sees nothing wrong with inflicting further pain on small businesses by raising their taxes during a crisis. **

Today, we launched our latest ad, "Small Business Relief," highlighting the struggles of small business owners and the **anti-business, anti-jobs record of my opponent.**

[If you're ready for a representative who will be focused on helping North Texans reopen businesses and get back to work, please make a contribution to my campaign today so that we can keep this ad on air. ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=24a5043ed1&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=9e1c95f843&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| **I'm a businesswoman. I know how to create jobs and will work tirelessly to bring our economy back to life. **
---
| There are only 19 days until Election Day, and Early Voting is already underway. [If you haven't yet contributed, now is the time. ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=3125bcc3ea&e=68aaeb0998)[I hope I can count on ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=e3d6640046&e=68aaeb0998)[your support](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=fe797c2435&e=68aaeb0998)[.](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=74335153cb&e=68aaeb0998)

The last thing our district needs is two more years represented by somebody who votes 100% with Nancy Pelosi. **We can do better.**

Thank you and God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32

subject: Take 20% off these Fall Favorites with FALL20 in the official Warren online store
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: New guidance
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Yesterday, I talked about what we're seeing in the data over the past few weeks. Our cases are trending in the wrong direction, and we're not seeing the same patterns we saw in the spring. Back then, it was large gatherings and events causing most of our cases. Now, they're coming from small, intimate gatherings -- a couple friends over for dinner, or coffee in a break room at work. We get comfortable and take off our mask. We've been at this for seven months, and it's easy to become passive with the rules. I find myself doing it sometimes. We're living through one of the most stressful times in our lives. But we cannot let our guard down. It's on all of us, in our personal and professional lives, to make the active choice to wear a mask and keep our distance. It's the only way we're going to keep people safe, keep our kids in school and continue reopening our economy.
So, today, I want to talk about some of the things we are doing statewide, and some actions that we can all take to be a part of the solution.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_q9OagFDEv51EErv92PUcpKKZ_8KUvOd0lAGuQZ-Cy_nru4b_Qgirg18HQWGAEm4QY3I65NkCCGCTfSqZxRqBJrdgmmxFgFRkOqF1FOOVNe_UcCZ6g-koMw-9ywDvcW8c4AG4qyL-vfc2f0eqDmTKdhAVTlYbcdvOhmC1Qrla_oZQ5dxG4NRsRG633KE3J-Ee3XAox7LoVg=&c=OYGewiwvdwHtbXtmwJYDfRZHIKc3fWxttgIwqdLjDeyMl1Tqbgvtkw==&ch=gVB8dg8fC9Zr4uxJplj-8OIxe75Gd1fHCCyrFUbjlUIP8ljwljI0Ag==)
---
| Click the graph to see check the Department of Health's [COVID-19 data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_q9OagFDEv51EErv92PUcpKKZ_8KUvOd0lAGuQZ-Cy_nru4b_Qgirg18HQWGAEm4QY3I65NkCCGCTfSqZxRqBJrdgmmxFgFRkOqF1FOOVNe_UcCZ6g-koMw-9ywDvcW8c4AG4qyL-vfc2f0eqDmTKdhAVTlYbcdvOhmC1Qrla_oZQ5dxG4NRsRG633KE3J-Ee3XAox7LoVg=&c=OYGewiwvdwHtbXtmwJYDfRZHIKc3fWxttgIwqdLjDeyMl1Tqbgvtkw==&ch=gVB8dg8fC9Zr4uxJplj-8OIxe75Gd1fHCCyrFUbjlUIP8ljwljI0Ag==).
---
| We need to be wearing masks more often. Anytime you're with people you don't live with -- wear a mask. Even if it's just with a small group of people in the comfort of your own home. Even if you're just going for a walk with a neighbor. We feel safe in these settings, and that's when the virus spreads. If we take off our masks, we could be spreading the virus without even knowing we have it, and our friends will then go into work and see their families, and it doesn't take long before it spirals. So let's make mask-wearing our default. Ask yourself, "Is there any reason I should NOT be wearing a mask right now?"
Let's move on to the holidays. Halloween is two weeks away. Trick-or-treating will still be allowed, but it's going to look different this year. We're asking that you go in small groups, stay six feet apart, and wear cloth masks the entire time. In addition, we're asking everyone to do your trick-or-treating in the daylight. As it gets darker, it gets more challenging - and less safe - for kids to be spread out in the way they need to be. So this year, I'm asking families to start a bit earlier and be home before sunset.
Do not, under any circumstance, have a Halloween party. Cases and hospitalizations are rising, and your decision to have a party will put more people in the hospital.
I also know people are already starting to plan for Thanksgiving. Please, keep it local this year and do not travel. We've talked all along about how our actions impact the case numbers we see a few weeks later. Well, three weeks after Halloween is Thanksgiving. And a month after that is Christmas. We were under a stay-at-home order for Easter, and Passover, and Ramadan. None of us wants to be back under a stay-at-home order for Thanksgiving or Christmas. But if we don't recommit ourselves to following the rules today, then it's not out of the question.
---
|
---
| Lastly, we all need to be getting tested more often. Doing asymptomatic or "sentinel" testing is key to our overall testing strategy, and it is especially important now. It allows us to better understand where our problem areas are and take a more targeted, precise approach to our response. And it helps you better protect your friends and family when you may not even know you've been exposed.
The picture above lists all of the different groups that are the current focus of our asymptomatic testing program. Anyone who falls into these categories, please go to [portal.ri.gov](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_q9OagFDEv51EErv92PUcpKKZ_8KUvOd0lAGuQZ-Cy_nru4b_Qgirr7Ylhp_j5FrJ4J_FEr5oFcSiajV4G-ht_4_BB8sNsFN2adeYMk5w-LF_vWI1a80Z_2N960b22Y1JuIxVXKb1SI=&c=OYGewiwvdwHtbXtmwJYDfRZHIKc3fWxttgIwqdLjDeyMl1Tqbgvtkw==&ch=gVB8dg8fC9Zr4uxJplj-8OIxe75Gd1fHCCyrFUbjlUIP8ljwljI0Ag==) and sign up for a free test. Over the next week, I want Rhode Island to run 4,000 asymptomatic tests.
This is a crucial junction for Rhode Island. Dr. Alexander-Scott will be discussing this new guidance further in a Facebook Live event with Dr. Philip Chan tomorrow at 2:30 p.m. You can view that event even if you do not have a Facebook account on the [RIDOH Facebook](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_q9OagFDEv51EErv92PUcpKKZ_8KUvOd0lAGuQZ-Cy_nru4b_QgirnaFwtTzQoHcu6cWiXN8dHgMtVFuU9AZr5MKBfl-7YM-XjS42O0MWU17z6MlA954J28CtaLSI9XsXFeqyJYERdmMMdEmZqBIg-fJtppVUhgm&c=OYGewiwvdwHtbXtmwJYDfRZHIKc3fWxttgIwqdLjDeyMl1Tqbgvtkw==&ch=gVB8dg8fC9Zr4uxJplj-8OIxe75Gd1fHCCyrFUbjlUIP8ljwljI0Ag==) page.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_q9OagFDEv51EErv92PUcpKKZ_8KUvOd0lAGuQZ-Cy_nru4b_QgirnaFwtTzQoHcz4NZ3bbRWwdaOfvDQd0ZyMVr892wmocQs6L_fusWJomP2ML5j7uWZO6nd_y15-woewgTJAGYTAdv_ByBH8dkXAj_MGhxvKwcZdiN7Ko2JE6RSCQ5yHKoBKWdG5YnzkHLCT7CTYo1sVeoZ5S9bUucMAri98loFPANJf51xXfg4nJuueA6VODHZMg_ec2W6vKuJBBuBjVRpgRUX5z8uBcHTXSg3KZYvi2tpPdMO9Y6vfrBdiRDqu8PHlviXV5_aEDAhmBZW4eU9Fc=&c=OYGewiwvdwHtbXtmwJYDfRZHIKc3fWxttgIwqdLjDeyMl1Tqbgvtkw==&ch=gVB8dg8fC9Zr4uxJplj-8OIxe75Gd1fHCCyrFUbjlUIP8ljwljI0Ag==).
---

Peter,

We’re in the final days before the election that we’ve been preparing for since January 2019 – and what an election season this has been.

Democrats have pulled out every trick in the book to sabotage President Trump and Conservatives all over the country. Simply put, they loathe everything we stand for. For Nancy Pelosi and her far-left compatriots in the House – attacking every conservative and Republican who opposes their agenda is personal. **Their mission is simple** : to do everything they can to defeat us on November 3rd.

In order to keep our operation fully funded through Election Day on November 3rd, **[we’ve determined that we will need 35,000 donors to make a contribution of $15 or more in the month of October](http://links.defenddjt.com/u/click?_t=fdbe24553aaa4172b98a2d6c8d833036&_m=ddf98468d70f4609bc09e50c60c4ae1f&_e=xw0aQ6AgIAITVDXJcxSF_pU5CmuVibIWv7O3BQ-3Olp7O2uhJikHM2j0WB38aMaySmiKZUh5qhUzJkS24-l-wyo5M4ODeTa_R-JC88AxXmhv8wets3MZTI8u5HUi8Ee4196gF-OILlXgLWmXmEzzhaf7qOGkMdakSaBtBHdUqOza4GI21W5UUMAuRPhOZx58zGQhypDX4vrZBbraTXqZyuuEK9fj6SLb9vivkRm7GIZ9Fz3ImUcErCN1cydyR1kfOfK4TczHE5ZL8QqIjuhy6Whi5WvFwmcm8Rm2Dt52lsEpVrRyC7hIr7f8ZV9iHZClOOpSjyzhBFJVtLl3QbAS0FwR6AMnlpF5VKx2DmRDAfaP-S0klqkicEShZnEUVTTQ-aeD4wq023T95YgPSiSq0w9ElKW0KvIGBhubQJ657fc%3D)** ; that is 1,129 donors every day between now and October 31st.

subject: The must-see moments from Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation hearings
body:
The Senate Judiciary Committee wrapped up its first week of confirmation hearings for Judge Amy Coney Barrett today. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a8416eff39&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • October 15, 2020
---
| | |
# **The must-see moments from Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation hearings**

**The Senate Judiciary Committee** wrapped up its first week of confirmation hearings for Judge Amy Coney Barrett today. The committee will vote next Thursday on whether to advance Judge Barrett’s Supreme Court nomination to the full Senate.

**Judge Barrett’s answers** to questions from Senators over the past four days demonstrate her extensive knowledge of the law and our Constitution. A few exchanges in particular reveal why she would be an important addition to the Supreme Court:

* [**Americans deserve an independent Court**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2f831d874&e=3ee4985eea): “I believe Americans of all backgrounds deserve an independent Supreme Court that interprets our Constitution and laws as they are written,” she said.

* [**The rule of law is sacred**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8e3e133a7f&e=3ee4985eea): Judge Barrett was asked why she accepted President Trump’s nomination for the Supreme Court. “If we are to protect our institutions, and protect the freedoms, and protect the rule of law that’s the basis for the society and the freedom that we all enjoy—if we want that for our children and our children’s children—then we need to participate in that work.”

* [**Judges shouldn’t be pundits**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a1b4e7f929&e=3ee4985eea): Each day this week, Senate Democrats tried to force Judge Barrett to share her personal political opinions. “I don’t think we want judges to be legal pundits. I think we want judges to approach cases thoughtfully, with an open mind,” she said.

* [**Decisions must be based in law**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=97f6e9a0c5&e=3ee4985eea): “When I write an opinion resolving a case, I read every word from the perspective of the losing party. I ask myself how I would view the decision if one of my children was the party that I was ruling against,” Judge Barrett said. “Even though I would not like the result, would I understand that the decision was fairly reasoned and grounded in law?”

* [**People of faith can serve**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=62697d7fe1&e=3ee4985eea)**:** Democrats and leftwing pundits suggest that Judge Barrett can’t be impartial because of her deeply held Catholic faith. Sen. Lindsay Graham asked Barrett if she would be able to set aside any personal beliefs in deciding the cases that come before her. "I can. I have done that in my time on the Seventh Circuit,” she said. “If I stay on the Seventh Circuit, I’ll continue to do that. If I’m confirmed to the Supreme Court, I will do that still."

**This week’s hearings** confirm what Americans already knew: Amy Coney Barrett is exceptionally qualified to sit on our Supreme Court. She has demonstrated a steadfast dedication to upholding our Constitution as written—and not legislating from the bench.

**Most important,** she will serve the American people with honor, distinction, and tremendous character on our Supreme Court.

[**Learn more about President Trump’s choice for the Supreme Court!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=578d135d30&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---

| Hoosier Republican,

The President’s campaign team asked us to share this with you. There’s an opportunity to earn some extra cash, and support President Donald J. Trump and Vice President Mike Pence in the process!

Today marks just 19 days until Election Day, and President Trump and Vice President Pence need you now more than ever. We must make sure they're reelected if we want to continue the momentum they've led for the American people.

In Liberty,
Team Trump

name: Laura Loomer
subject: HUGE endorsement, Patriot (I can barely believe it!)
body:
Our campaign is just short of the $230,000 we need to raise before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to make our final FEC reporting deadline.
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397697-936322-5245559-764c5f36c6-fc4f493eee)
[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397697-936322-5245559-764c5f36c6-fc4f493eee) Patriot,

I just got a _huge_ endorsement from President Trump’s former National Security Advisor, **General Michael Flynn** :

“**Florida needs Laura Loomer for Congressional District 21.** Laura is a courageous fighter for regular people, NOT a career politician, and she always stands up for American values and principles.

I strongly endorse her and pray the good people of District 21 join with me to get Laura to Washington DC.”

General Flynn is a true American hero--having served our nation bravely and boldly both on the battlefield and in the Oval Office.

What’s more, he also survived one of the most vicious media malpractices of all time:

In 2017, the mainstream media, the Washington bureaucracy, and Big Tech colluded to frame General Flynn for the “Russiagate” scandal we now know never existed.

Like me, **General Flynn knows what it’s like to have everyone fighting against you... and _still_ manage to win**.

I can’t wait to make him proud in Washington. But I need your help to amplify our message and grow our momentum in the critical weeks to come.

[**Will you stand with me, General Flynn, and conservatives all across the country... by making a donation of $10 or more to this campaign?**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397697-936322-5245559-764c5f36c6-fc4f493eee)

[**Please make your most generous donation of $10, $25, or even $50 to help me get to Washington.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-397697-936322-5245559-764c5f36c6-fc4f493eee)

Thanks for your help!

Laura Loomer

subject: Help us call Jackie out of hiding.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Jackie is showing signs of nervousness. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d89b3b2119&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Jackie sees what we all see – the defection of support from those who once placed their trust in her.

In case you missed the article in this past [Sunday’s South Bend Tribune about the IN02 race,](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=62f09e0287&e=5886ca081d) Jackie was asked tough questions about her votes being aligned with her corporate PAC contributors. Her campaign manager and spokesperson became thin-skinned and defensive.

We have more bad news for Jackie, our People-powered campaign is dismantling her autocratic control.

---
| |
* [Ninety-five (95%) of our contributions in the second quarter were from individuals compared to Jackies’s forty-nine (49%). ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=49264d3e05&e=5886ca081d)

* [Eighty one percent (81%) of our contributions during the second quarter were from Indiana compared to Jackie’s thirty-five percent (35%).](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d93f6f8f75&e=5886ca081d)

* [People we’ve called have told us even though they’ve always voted Repubican, Pat has their vote this year.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=162efbf997&e=5886ca081d)

* [Besides being featured in the New York Times, Time Magazine, NBC news, The National Catholic Reporter, and other national news, Pat has been endorsed by former Presidential candidate Pete Buttigieg, U.S. Sen. Joe Donnelly, South Bend leader Lynn Coleman, the National Education Association, and more than a dozen other regional city leaders and national organizations.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5aee63a10e&e=5886ca081d)

---
|
Jackie is nervous because she’s realizing that a People-powered campaign like ours has the power to restore to our imagination what the great experiment of democracy is all about – that we can be governed as Thomas Jefferson said, “by reason and truth,” and that the foundation of our country’s creed – government of the people, for the people, by the people – is not lost.

Pat is not afraid to hold Jackie accountable for her abysmal record, her reckless votes, and her dereliction of duty as a sitting congresswoman. Pat is calling Jackie out of hiding.

We need your help. We need to keep Pat up on television. Will you contribute to send a message to Jackie that this People-powered campaign is not intimidated by her?

---
| [CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $25](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7c158914b6&e=5886ca081d "CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $25")
---
| [CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $50](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1b6a23d4df&e=5886ca081d "CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $50")
---
| [CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $100](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=56dd1b893e&e=5886ca081d "CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $100")
---
| [CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $500](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=192eeafe5b&e=5886ca081d "CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR $500")
---
| [CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR SOMETHING ELSE](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=fe28428c88&e=5886ca081d "CALL JACKIE OUT OF HIDING FOR SOMETHING ELSE")
---
| _If you’ve saved your information with ActBlue, your donation will go through automatically._

The momentum is ours. With your financial investment and time volunteering, the path to victory is in sight.

-Team Hackett

name: =?utf-8?Q?Randy=20Feenstra?=
subject: We will not be bought
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | Friend,
---
| As we quickly approach Election Day, I wanted to write to you and remind you why I entered this race to begin with, and why I’m running now.

I got into the race nearly twenty months ago because it became apparent to me that our District needed an effective, conservative voice in Congress. Someone that would speak up for Iowa and the issues that affect us in our day to day lives and could effectively deliver solutions and results. I still believe this, and it remains a primary driver behind my campaign.
---
| [Help us out by clicking here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=dd4275102e&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Help us out by clicking here")
---
| Our values are on the ballot, and I'm committed to defending them.

As Democrats from across the country pour money into Iowa, it's become obvious to all that they want to fundamentally change our state. We’ve been unwilling to change the way we live our lives to fit their vision, so now they’re trying to buy us out.

That isn’t going to happen though, because we won’t let it. Our district will always stand for what this country was founded on: life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness. We believe in a country where life is defended, liberty respected, and folks are free to go about living as they see fit, free from a government that tells them what to do and how to think.

Our voice and our way of life will not be bought by Silicon Valley billionaires, but I need your help to tell them the Fourth District isn’t for sale. Chip in to help me out, and on November 3rd we’ll send them a message that’s loud and clear.
---
| [Click here to chip in $12](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b5890ec61d&e=d48ad6f8f4 "Click here to chip in $12")
---
|
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FEENSTRA FOR CONGRESS
---
| Feenstra For Congress641 2nd StHull, IA 51239-7323
[Add us to your address book](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/vcard?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/profile?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=5114b6cce8&e=d48ad6f8f4&c=71d13d19fe).

Be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=1c2048787e&e=d48ad6f8f4), [Twitter](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=28c0d143c0&e=d48ad6f8f4), and [Instagram](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=52074da2b5&e=d48ad6f8f4). If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints or feedback please send us your ideas [here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=562e3f2e71&e=d48ad6f8f4) or by replying to this email.

Want to get involved with our campaign? Sign up to volunteer [here](https://feenstraforcongress.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5970947ea371ac8a6b92da016&id=b7c7bfedc5&e=d48ad6f8f4).
---

name: My Faith Votes
subject: You’re Invited: Virtual Seminar “How Then Shall We Vote?”
body:
| | RSVP for this Pro-Life Event
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaoKtzDUYfBhKGwS9Qv7TsMep_R798fq2PTSdAUnxcxJROYI6Oh3EBNwOfie_uKT6w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015event01&n=1)
| Peter, Join us this Sunday, October 18 at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT for the crucially important virtual seminar _“How Then Shall We Vote”_ hosted by **My Faith Votes** , featuring the**Colson Center for Christian Worldview** and the**Life Training Institute**. This virtual seminar was created to provide clarity for pro-life Christians to engage and vote this November. You will hear from some of the top pro-life speakers in the nation including Scott Klusendorf, President of Life Training Institute; John Stonestreet, President of the Colson Center for Christian Worldview; Seth Gruber, Professional Pro-Life Speaker; Jannique Steward, Founder of Love Protects, and our own Paul Isaacs from My Faith Votes. We encourage you to help advance a culture of life in our nation by inviting your friends and family to this virtual event. **[RSVP for “ _How Then Shall We Vote”_ on Sunday, October 18, at 8:00 PM ET / 5:00 PM PT.](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaoKtzDUYfBhKGwS9Qv7TsMep_R798fq2PTSdAUnxcxJROYI6Oh3EBNwOfie_uKT6w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015event01&n=2 "RSVP for How Then Shall We Vote")** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66iaoKtzDUYfBhKGwS9Qv7TsMep_R798fq2PTSdAUnxcxJROYI6Oh3EBNwOfie_uKT6w&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015event01&n=3) Now is the time for Christians across the country to take biblical values to the polls and speak up for the voiceless. We look forward to seeing you virtually on Sunday evening. **Pray. Think. Vote.** [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201015event01&n=4)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: The sexism I've experienced on this campaign could fill a book
body:
The first donation I asked for on this campaign was me in a cushy office, sitting across the table from a man I’d known for years. He knew I had been | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/cf6d7589870d/the-sexism-ive-experienced-on-this-campaign-could-fill-a-book?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| |
#
The first donation I asked for on this campaign was me in a cushy office, sitting across the table from a man I’d known for years.

He knew I had been considering running for Congress and he was excited for the race. He told me I had his full support, and I told him I’d need it.

He spent 45 minutes telling me everything I needed to do to win -- it was well-intentioned advice, but not informed by experience (he’d never worked in politics, never run for or held office), and I tried not to let the word “mansplaining” cloud my commitment to listening and learning. The advice was not particularly useful, but as the meeting closed, I geared up for the big ask.

“Will you make a donation to support my campaign?”

He laughed. “The advice I just gave you is worth so much more than a donation would be.”

I was floored. I thought I’d had his support, but now, it seemed, that support was tacit at best.

I thanked him for his time, excused myself, and began to leave.

As I was walking out the door, he grabbed my ass.

I’ve told this story a handful of times on the campaign trail. It’s not comfortable to share, it gives me no pleasure, and I don’t typically dwell on things like this. I’m 35 -- I’ve faced my share of sexism, and I’m happiest when I can move on quickly.

But every time I recount this experience, a woman shares her story or a man responds with shock, and I’m reminded about why it’s so important that we continue to talk about sexism and our experiences with sexism. I’m reminded about why it’s so important to elect more womxn.

We are less than three weeks from the election, and the sexism I’ve experienced on this campaign could fill a book. But I am as committed as ever to winning this race, because we need people like me in office. [Will you help me get there? ](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=7268e25dd6&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks,
Dani

name: Policy Team (Mark Warner for VA)
subject: Survey: COVID-19 relief bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Will you please fill out our quick three-question survey?
|
---

| | Derek --

Mark Warner has been outspoken about the fact that Congress _must_ pass and the President _must_ sign another coronavirus relief package to help folks who are struggling during the coronavirus pandemic. Unfortunately, the GOP-controlled Senate has refused to pass a bill that would actually get resources to folks who need them -- not just prop up corporations.

Mark Warner is focused on making sure that we're taking care of Main Street, not just Wall Street, and that every Virginian is getting the resources they need to make it through this challenging time.

Now, he's looking for your thoughts on a new relief bill. Will you please fill out our quick three-question survey? **[Take the survey.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da26/53d9897e/555557ee/1c88f61d/3673438426/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-covids")** President Trump is flip-flopping on whether or not he wants a second relief bill -- and the American people are paying the price. Recently, he even tweeted that he was instructing Treasury Secretary Steve Mnuchin to end all negotiations until _after_ the election ... before intense criticism caused him to change his tune just a few days later.

**The health, safety, and economic security of Virginians is a serious matter.** Mark Warner won't play politics with Virginians' lives and livelihoods.

**That 's why Mark wants to hear from folks like you. [Please take his survey today and tell him your thoughts.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da26/53d9897e/555557ee/1c88f61d/3673438426/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://warnerforva.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/warner-covids")**

Thank you,
Policy Team, Mark Warner for Virginia ** **
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da26/53d9897e/555557ee/1c88f61c/3673438426/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijg4MSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=2020105_s_2_fl__881__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**

name: Joshua Scott for Congress
subject: The Final Push- Our Craziest Weekend Yet
body:
Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=h6wcC2Cj6IfBCP.&b=VeJKQ5cnMOJRXAbVNfma_Q

Peter

We just had the busiest weekend of the campaign season, and what perfect timing! If you were at any of the events, you were able to see the amazing momentum we have built.

On Saturday, I participated in a candidate forum with the San Gabriel Valley NAACP. I was sure this would finally be my chance to speak about issues on the same platform as my opponent, Grace Napolitano, but of course, in typical fashion, she did not show up. Regardless, I was able to reach across the aisle and articulate my positions on many key issues to a great group, and I am so appreciative to have been invited to the forum.

Immediately after the forum ended, I went straight to the Freedom Rally, where my team had been holding it down for me among another massive group of patriots.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=h6wcC2Cj6IfBCP.&b=LItC4OXVDItm4rFoG78X_w

On Sunday, I was blessed to be a featured speaker at Lighthouse Baptist Church's God and Country day. It was an unforgettable celebration of patriotic traditions that I was honored to be a part of, and I am so grateful that so many from the community came out to support this amazing event. This congregation has been through a lot in 2020, and I was proud to share my unwavering commitment to upholding their rights, no matter what.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=h6wcC2Cj6IfBCP.&b=LItC4OXVDItm4rFoG78X_w

Imagehttps://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=h6wcC2Cj6IfBCP.&b=LItC4OXVDItm4rFoG78X_w

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=h6wcC2Cj6IfBCP.&b=LItC4OXVDItm4rFoG78X_w

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=GSTzK&m=h6wcC2Cj6IfBCP.&b=LItC4OXVDItm4rFoG78X_w

It has truly been an honor fighting tyranny, promoting freedom, and being leader for all in District 32. We will be working even harder these next few weeks with the hopes of making history. Get involved for the final push. Come to an event, Let me know if you need a yard sign. Chip in $5 if you can.

Can't wait to see you soon.

clean_body: Image Peter We just had the busiest weekend of the campaign season, and what perfect timing! If you were at any of the events, you were able to see the amazing momentum we have built. On Saturday, I participated in a candidate forum with the San Gabriel Valley NAACP. I was sure this would finally be my chance to speak about issues on the same platform as my opponent, Grace Napolitano, but of course, in typical fashion, she did not show up. Regardless, I was able to reach across the aisle and articulate my positions on many key issues to a great group, and I am so appreciative to have been invited to the forum. Immediately after the forum ended, I went straight to the Freedom Rally, where my team had been holding it down for me among another massive group of patriots. Image On Sunday, I was blessed to be a featured speaker at Lighthouse Baptist Church's God and Country day. It was an unforgettable celebration of patriotic traditions that I was honored to be a part of, and I am so grateful that so many from the community came out to support this amazing event. This congregation has been through a lot in 2020, and I was proud to share my unwavering commitment to upholding their rights, no matter what. Image Image Image It has truly been an honor fighting tyranny, promoting freedom, and being leader for all in District 32. We will be working even harder these next few weeks with the hopes of making history. Get involved for the final push. Come to an event, Let me know if you need a yard sign. Chip in $5 if you can. Can't wait to see you soon. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt Out-Raises Fletcher 2 to 1
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
**Wesley Hunt Out-Raises Lizzie Fletcher 2 to 1**

Houston, TX - Today, Wesley Hunt, Houston native and combat veteran running for Congress in Texas' 7th Congressional District, announced that he more than doubled his opponent's fundraising numbers in the third quarter of this year. In the final approach to Election Day, Hunt announced a third quarter fundraising haul of nearly $2.8 million to his campaign account, while his opponent, Representative Lizzie Fletcher, raised less than $1.3 million in the same period. With Election Day just 19 days away, and Hunt's fundraising successes are putting him in an even more competitive position than ever before to defeat Fletcher at the ballot box.

_"I am humbled by the outpouring of support we received from fellow Texans last quarter,"_ **said Hunt. **_"From day one, our campaign has heard consistently from 7th District residents that they are ready for change. This past fundraising quarter is evidence of that sentiment. Not only did we surpass Congresswoman Fletcher, but we more than doubled the support she received. This significant gap between my fundraising numbers and hers makes clear where 7th District voters stand. I'd like to thank all of the Team Hunt supporters who have entrusted our campaign with their hard-earned dollars; I will never stop working to earn your trust and support and I will always fight to defend your interests, whether here in Houston or on Capitol Hill." _

Wesley Hunt is a Houston native and a battle-tested leader willing to stand up for the 7th Congressional District. While his opponent Lizzie Fletcher made Pelosi Speaker of the House and refuses to condemn the most liberal of Democratic priorities, Wesley is a problem solver who will work with both sides to bring results home to the 7th District.
_Hunt raised $2.8 million to Hunt for Congress with an additional $500,000 to the Hunt Victory Fund._
